appetizer.name: Italian Meatballs
appetizer.description: Classic Italian-American meatballs, typically made from ground beef and/or pork, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, eggs, and herbs, simmered in tomato sauce.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Savory ground meat meatballs simmered in tomato sauce.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Tender and flavorful Italian meatballs, perfect for any occasion.

appetizer.name: Asiago Zucchini Bites
appetizer.description: Small bites or fritters made with shredded zucchini, Asiago cheese, breadcrumbs, egg, and seasonings, then baked or fried until golden.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Savory zucchini and Asiago cheese bites, often baked or fried.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Cheesy and flavorful zucchini bites, perfect for starting a meal.

appetizer.name: Avocado deviled Eggs
appetizer.description: A twist on classic deviled eggs, where creamy avocado is blended into the yolk filling, often with lime juice, cilantro, and a hint of spice.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Deviled eggs with avocado mixed into the yolk filling for creaminess and flavor.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Creamy deviled eggs with a healthy avocado twist. (Values per egg half).

appetizer.name: Dolmades - Grape leaves stuffed with rice and fresh herbs
appetizer.description: Dolmades (or Dolmadakia Yialantzi if meatless) are tender grape leaves stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, onions, and copious fresh herbs like parsley, mint, and dill. They are gently simmered in a lemony broth with olive oil.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Grape leaves stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek meze. Check if pine nuts are included.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful rice-stuffed grape leaves. (Values per dolma).

appetizer.name: Patatas Bravas
appetizer.description: A classic Spanish tapas dish consisting of white potatoes that have been cut into irregular shapes of about 2 centimeters, then fried in oil and served warm with a spicy tomato-based 'salsa brava' and often a garlic aioli.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_EGG (if served with traditional aioli, please inquire)
CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if vinegar is used in salsa/aioli)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Crispy fried potatoes with a spicy tomato sauce (salsa brava). Often served with garlic aioli (contains egg). Vegan if aioli is omitted or a vegan version is used.
suitableForDiets: VEGAN_DIET (without aioli or with vegan aioli)
appetizer.customerGuidance: A Spanish classic: crispy potatoes with a zesty, spicy tomato sauce.

appetizer.name: Potato Croquettes
appetizer.description: Mashed potatoes, often mixed with cheese, herbs, or other flavorings, shaped into small logs or balls, coated in breadcrumbs, and deep-fried until golden and crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if cheese or butter/milk in mashed potatoes is used)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Crispy fried mashed potato balls or logs. Contain wheat and egg. Usually contain dairy from cheese or mashed potato preparation; please inquire.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Crispy on the outside, soft and fluffy potato croquettes. (Values per croquette).

appetizer.name: Caprese Stuffed Avocado
appetizer.description: Avocado halves filled with a classic Caprese salad mixture of fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, basil, and often drizzled with balsamic glaze.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Avocado halves filled with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Fresh and flavorful Caprese salad nestled in creamy avocado halves.

appetizer.name: Roasted Beets with Burrata
appetizer.description: A delightful contrast of sweet roasted beets (often mixed varieties) and creamy, rich burrata cheese, typically dressed with olive oil, balsamic glaze, and perhaps fresh herbs or toasted nuts.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_NUTS (if nuts are added as garnish)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Sweet roasted beets paired with creamy burrata cheese.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Earthy roasted beets beautifully complemented by luxurious, creamy burrata.

appetizer.name: Caprese
appetizer.description: A simple Italian salad, made of sliced fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and sweet basil, seasoned with salt and olive oil. Often arranged in layers.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Slices of fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes, and basil, drizzled with olive oil.
appetizer.customerGuidance: The epitome of Italian simplicity: fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and basil.

appetizer.name: Cabbage Rolls with rice, dried figs, pine nuts, and aromatic herbs
appetizer.description: Tender cabbage leaves wrapped around a savory filling of rice, dried figs, toasted pine nuts, and aromatic herbs, often simmered in a light broth or tomato sauce.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Cabbage leaves stuffed with a fragrant mixture of rice, figs, pine nuts, and herbs.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Delicate cabbage rolls with a unique sweet and savory filling.

appetizer.name: Eggplant Napolean layered with roasted red peppers
appetizer.description: A stacked dish (Napolean) featuring layers of grilled or roasted eggplant slices and roasted red peppers, often with a balsamic glaze, fresh herbs, and sometimes goat cheese or mozzarella (though not specified here, making it potentially vegan).
appetizer.preparationNotes: Layers of roasted eggplant and red peppers, often drizzled with balsamic glaze.
appetizer.customerGuidance: An elegant stack of roasted eggplant and sweet red peppers.

appetizer.name: Gigante Beans baked in a rich tomato dill sauce
appetizer.description: Large, creamy Greek gigante beans baked in a savory tomato sauce infused with dill, garlic, onions, and olive oil until tender and flavorful.
appetizer.category: Appetizer / Meze / Side Dish / Light Main
appetizer.preparationNotes: Large white beans baked in a rich tomato sauce with fresh dill.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Creamy, large Greek beans baked in a flavorful tomato and dill sauce.

appetizer.name: Dolmades with bulgur, currants, and dried figs
appetizer.description: A vegan version of Dolmades (stuffed grape leaves), where tender grape leaves are filled with a mixture of bulgur wheat, sweet currants, chopped dried figs, onions, fresh herbs (like parsley, mint, dill), and pine nuts (optional), then simmered in a lemony broth.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Grape leaves stuffed with bulgur, currants, figs, and herbs, simmered until tender.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Flavorful vegan stuffed grape leaves with a unique sweet and savory filling. (Nutritional values per dolma)

appetizer.name: Southwest Style Spring Rolls with a zesty dip
appetizer.description: Crispy spring rolls filled with a Southwestern-inspired mixture, often including ingredients like chicken or black beans, corn, bell peppers, onions, cheese, and spices, served with a zesty dipping sauce (e.g., avocado-lime crema, chipotle aioli).
appetizer.preparationNotes: Crispy spring rolls with a savory Southwestern filling, served with dip.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Crispy spring rolls packed with Southwestern flavors, served with a zesty dip. (Nutritional values per roll, before dip)

appetizer.name: Jalapeño Poppers
appetizer.description: Jalapeño peppers halved, deseeded, filled with a creamy cheese mixture (often cream cheese and cheddar), then breaded and deep-fried or baked until golden.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Spicy jalapeños filled with cheese, breaded, and fried or baked. Contains dairy, wheat, and egg. May sometimes include bacon.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Cheesy, spicy, and crispy jalapeño poppers. (Values per popper).

appetizer.name: Tyrokroketes - A blend of three Greek cheeses rolled into delightful tangy balls and coated with sesame seeds
appetizer.description: Tyrokroketes are Greek cheese croquettes. They are made from a blend of tangy and melty Greek cheeses (often feta, kefalotyri, graviera), sometimes with a hint of spice or herbs, rolled into balls, coated (this version specifies sesame seeds, traditionally often breadcrumbs), and fried until golden and crispy.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Fried cheese balls made with a blend of Greek cheeses and coated in sesame seeds. Contains dairy, egg, wheat, and sesame.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Crispy, tangy, and irresistible Greek cheese balls with sesame. (Values per ball).

appetizer.name: Saganaki Cheese - Cheese is deep fried to make a crispy outside, with a melty gooey inside. Flambeed tableside! (Family style only)
appetizer.description: A spectacular Greek appetizer where a firm, salty Greek cheese (like Kefalotyri, Kefalograviera, or Kasseri) is pan-fried or deep-fried until it has a crispy golden-brown crust and a molten, gooey interior. It is famously flambéed tableside with brandy or ouzo, and a squeeze of lemon is added to douse the flames.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Fried Greek cheese, flambéed tableside. Contains dairy and wheat. Alcohol is used in flambé.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Opa! Crispy, melty fried cheese with a tableside flambé. (Family style only).

appetizer.name: Bacon-Wrapped Jalapeño Poppers
appetizer.description: Jalapeño peppers stuffed with a creamy cheese filling (often cream cheese and cheddar), wrapped in bacon, and then baked or grilled until crispy.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Spicy jalapeños filled with cheese and wrapped in crispy bacon.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Spicy, cheesy, and smoky bacon-wrapped delights. (Nutritional info per popper)

appetizer.name: Spanakopita Triangles (Spinach & feta pastries)
appetizer.description: Savory Greek pastries made with flaky phyllo dough filled with a mixture of spinach, feta cheese, onions, dill, and sometimes egg.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Crispy, flaky triangles filled with a savory spinach and feta mixture.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Deliciously flaky Greek spinach and feta pastries. (Nutritional info per triangle)

appetizer.name: Grilled Halloumi & Marinated Octopus Skewers
appetizer.description: Skewers featuring salty, semi-hard halloumi cheese grilled until golden and tender, paired with succulent marinated octopus, offering a delightful contrast of textures and Mediterranean flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SHELLFISH (octopus - though technically a cephalopod, often grouped with shellfish for allergies)
CONTAINS_SULPHITES (lemon juice, wine in marinade if used)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Grilled skewers with savory halloumi and tender, flavorful octopus.
appetizer.customerGuidance: A taste of the Mediterranean: grilled halloumi and octopus skewers.

appetizer.name: Dolmades Yalantzi (Stuffed grape leaves with rice & herbs)
appetizer.description: A classic Greek meze, 'Dolmades Yalantzi' are tender grape leaves stuffed with a fragrant mixture of rice, onions, fresh herbs like parsley, dill, and mint, and sometimes pine nuts, then simmered in lemon-infused olive oil.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_NUTS (pine nuts). Please inquire if nut-free is required.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Tender grape leaves filled with an aromatic rice and herb mixture. Usually served cold or at room temperature.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Delicate and flavorful rice-stuffed grape leaves. (Nutritional info per piece)

appetizer.name: Mini Spanakopita (Spinach & Feta Puffs)
appetizer.description: Bite-sized versions of the classic Greek savory pastry, featuring a rich filling of spinach, feta cheese, onions, and herbs, all encased in flaky phyllo dough.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Small, savory pastries with a classic spinach and feta filling in crisp phyllo.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Irresistible bite-sized spinach and feta puffs. (Nutritional info per piece)

appetizer.name: Stuffed Grape Leaves (Dolmades)
appetizer.description: Tender grape leaves wrapped around a savory filling, typically made with rice, fresh herbs like parsley, mint, and dill, onions, and sometimes pine nuts or ground meat. Served cold or warm, often with a lemon wedge or yogurt sauce.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_NUTS (pine nuts). Please inquire if nut-free is required.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Classic Mediterranean delight of herbed rice wrapped in tender grape leaves. Assumed meatless (Yalantzi style).
appetizer.customerGuidance: Flavorful and tender stuffed grape leaves. (Nutritional info per piece)

appetizer.name: Patatas Bravas with Smoked Paprika Aioli
appetizer.description: A classic Spanish tapa featuring crispy fried potato cubes served with a zesty, slightly spicy tomato-based 'bravas' sauce and a creamy, garlicky smoked paprika aioli.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Crispy potatoes with two distinct sauces: a spicy tomato sauce and a creamy smoked paprika aioli.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Irresistible Spanish crispy potatoes with spicy bravas sauce and smoky aioli.

appetizer.name: Chicken Satay
appetizer.description: A popular Southeast Asian appetizer of grilled marinated chicken skewers, served in a shooter glass, often with a rich and flavorful peanut dipping sauce.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Marinated chicken pieces threaded onto skewers, grilled or baked, and served with peanut sauce. Soy sauce used in marinade may contain wheat; check if gluten-free version is used.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Tender grilled chicken skewer with a classic savory peanut dipping sauce.

appetizer.name: Greek Village - Tomato, feta, cucumber and olive
appetizer.description: A refreshing shooter version of a Greek salad (Horiatiki), featuring chunks of ripe tomato, crisp cucumber, salty feta cheese, and Kalamata olives, typically dressed with olive oil and oregano.
appetizer.preparationNotes: A deconstructed Greek salad served in a shooter glass. Ingredients are typically diced or layered.
appetizer.customerGuidance: A bite-sized burst of fresh Greek salad flavors.

appetizer.name: Korean BBQ pork belly
appetizer.description: Succulent pieces of pork belly marinated in a sweet and savory Korean BBQ sauce (often Gochujang-based), grilled or pan-seared, and served on a mini skewer.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Pork belly marinated and cooked until tender with slightly crispy edges. Gochujang and soy sauce may contain wheat; check for gluten-free versions if needed.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Rich and flavorful Korean BBQ pork belly on a skewer.

appetizer.name: French onion tartlets with Gruyere and dill
appetizer.description: Bite-sized tartlets filled with sweet caramelized onions, savory Gruyère cheese, and a hint of fresh dill, encased in a crispy pastry shell, often phyllo or shortcrust.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Slowly caramelized onions mixed with cheese and herbs, baked in small pastry cups until golden and bubbly.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Classic French onion soup flavors in an elegant, bite-sized tartlet.

appetizer.name: Spinach, feta and leek
appetizer.description: A savory vol-au-vent (puff pastry case) filled with a creamy mixture of sautéed spinach, tangy feta cheese, and mild leeks.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Flaky puff pastry shells filled with a warm, savory mixture of spinach, feta, and leeks.
appetizer.customerGuidance: A classic savory pastry with a delicious spinach, feta, and leek filling.

appetizer.name: Loaded Potato Skins
appetizer.description: Crispy potato skins typically filled with melted cheddar cheese, crispy bacon bits, and often topped with sour cream and chives.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Baked or fried potato skins filled with cheese and bacon, then often broiled until bubbly. Served hot.
appetizer.customerGuidance: A classic, crowd-pleasing appetizer: cheesy, bacony potato skins.

appetizer.name: Crispy Falafel with tahini drizzle
appetizer.description: Deep-fried balls or patties made from ground chickpeas and/or fava beans, herbs, and spices. Served crispy, often with a drizzle of tahini sauce.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_WHEAT (if wheat flour used as binder, verify if chickpea flour only)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Crispy fried patties of ground chickpeas and herbs, served with tahini sauce.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Deliciously crispy falafel made from chickpeas and herbs, drizzled with tahini. (Nutritional values approximate per piece)

appetizer.name: Chorizo Queso Dip
appetizer.description: A rich and savory melted cheese dip (queso) with spicy chorizo sausage mixed in. Served warm, typically with tortilla chips.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Warm, creamy queso dip blended with spicy chorizo sausage.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Indulgent and savory queso dip with a kick of chorizo. (Nutritional values per serving of dip, excludes chips)

appetizer.name: Queso Dip
appetizer.description: A warm, creamy, melted cheese dip, popular in Tex-Mex cuisine. Often made with processed cheese (like Velveeta) or a blend of cheeses (like cheddar, Monterey Jack) mixed with milk or cream, and typically includes chili peppers (e.g., jalapeños, green chilies) and sometimes tomatoes, onions, or spices. Served with tortilla chips.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Warm, creamy melted cheese dip, often with chilies.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Rich and creamy queso dip, perfect for sharing. (Nutritional values per serving of dip, excludes chips)

appetizer.name: Escabeche - House-made picked vegetable medley
appetizer.description: A Latin American and Mediterranean condiment or side dish of pickled vegetables. This house-made version is a medley, likely featuring carrots, onions, jalapeños, cauliflower, and herbs in a vinegar-based brine.
appetizer.preparationNotes: A house-made medley of pickled vegetables in a tangy brine.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Our signature house-made pickled vegetable medley, Escabeche. (Nutritional values per small serving)

appetizer.name: Vegetarian Empanadas
appetizer.description: Savory turnovers made with pastry dough and filled with a vegetarian mixture, which can include ingredients like spiced potatoes, peas, corn, cheese, spinach, mushrooms, or lentils. Baked or fried.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_EGG (if used in dough or as wash)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Pastry turnovers with a savory vegetarian filling; filling specifics vary.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Delicious vegetarian empanadas with a savory filling. Inquire for today's filling. (Nutritional values per empanada)

appetizer.name: Guacamole
appetizer.description: An avocado-based dip or spread, traditionally made by mashing ripe avocados with salt. Modern versions often include lime juice, cilantro, onions, and jalapeños or serranos.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Creamy mashed avocado dip with lime, onion, cilantro, and peppers.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Freshly made creamy guacamole. (Nutritional values per 2 tablespoons)

appetizer.name: Hummus - Chickpea, tahini, lemon
appetizer.description: A smooth and creamy Middle Eastern dip or spread made from cooked, mashed chickpeas blended with tahini (sesame paste), fresh lemon juice, and garlic. Often garnished with olive oil and paprika or parsley.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Classic chickpea and tahini dip. Contains sesame.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Creamy and savory chickpea dip with tahini and lemon. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Tzatziki - Yogurt, garlic, cucumber, herbs
appetizer.description: A classic Greek and Middle Eastern dip or sauce made from strained yogurt, grated or finely diced cucumber, minced garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs such as dill or mint. Often includes lemon juice.
appetizer.preparationNotes: A refreshing yogurt and cucumber dip. Contains dairy.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Cool, creamy, and refreshing Greek yogurt dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Melitzanosalata - Eggplant, garlic, tahini, cilantro
appetizer.description: A flavorful roasted eggplant dip. This version combines smoky roasted eggplant pulp with garlic, tahini for added creaminess, fresh cilantro for a distinct herbal note, lemon juice, and olive oil.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Smoky roasted eggplant dip with tahini and fresh cilantro. Contains sesame.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Smoky eggplant dip with a creamy texture from tahini and a fresh cilantro twist. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Spicy Feta - Feta cheese puree with spicy peppers
appetizer.description: Known as Tirokafteri in Greek, this is a zesty and creamy dip made from puréed or crumbled feta cheese blended with spicy peppers (such as hot chili peppers or roasted red peppers with a kick), olive oil, and sometimes a touch of yogurt or red wine vinegar.
appetizer.preparationNotes: A creamy and spicy feta cheese dip. Contains dairy.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Creamy, tangy, and spicy feta cheese spread. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Taramasalata - Cod roe, potato, extra virgin olive oil
appetizer.description: A traditional Greek meze dip made from tarama (salted and cured fish roe, typically from cod, carp, or mullet), emulsified with either bread or potato, extra virgin olive oil, and lemon juice to create a creamy, savory spread.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if bread is used as emulsifier instead of potato, please inquire)
appetizer.preparationNotes: A creamy dip made from cured fish roe. This version uses potato. Confirm if bread is used as an alternative for gluten concerns.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Unique and savory cured fish roe dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Beet Hummus - Roasted beets, chickpea, garlic, tahini, evoo
appetizer.description: A vibrant and earthy variation of traditional hummus, where roasted beets are blended with chickpeas, tahini (sesame paste), garlic, lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
appetizer.preparationNotes: A colorful and flavorful hummus variant with roasted beets. Contains sesame.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Vibrant beet hummus, both earthy and tangy. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Baba Ghanoush
appetizer.description: A Levantine appetizer consisting of finely chopped roasted eggplant, olive oil, lemon juice, various seasonings, and tahini. The eggplant is typically baked or broiled over an open flame before peeling, so that the pulp is soft and has a smoky taste.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Smoky and creamy roasted eggplant dip with tahini. Contains sesame.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Rich, smoky, and creamy eggplant dip. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Muhammara
appetizer.description: A rich, savory, and slightly tangy Middle Eastern dip made primarily from roasted red peppers, ground walnuts, breadcrumbs, and pomegranate molasses, often seasoned with garlic, olive oil, lemon juice, and spices like cumin and red pepper flakes.
appetizer.preparationNotes: A robust dip with a unique sweet, tangy, nutty, and slightly spicy flavor profile. Contains walnuts and wheat.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Savory roasted red pepper and walnut dip with a hint of pomegranate. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Signature Fresh Guacamole
appetizer.description: A signature, freshly prepared guacamole made from ripe avocados mashed with lime juice, diced onions, chopped cilantro, tomatoes (optional), jalapeños (optional), and salt.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Freshly made guacamole with classic ingredients.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Our signature fresh and creamy guacamole. (Values per 2 tbsp serving).

appetizer.name: Smoked pork Belly
appetizer.description: Rich and succulent pork belly, slow-smoked to achieve a tender texture and often a crispy exterior or skin.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Pork belly, typically salt-cured or brined, then slow-smoked. May be served as slices or cubes. Check if any glaze is used.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Indulgently rich and flavorful smoked pork belly. (Values per approx. 100g serving).

appetizer.name: BBQ Prawns
appetizer.description: Large prawns (shrimp) grilled or pan-seared and coated in a flavorful barbecue sauce.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Prawns cooked and tossed in BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Succulent BBQ prawns with a smoky, sweet, or tangy glaze.

appetizer.name: BBQ Black Tiger Prawns
appetizer.description: Large, meaty Black Tiger prawns grilled or pan-seared and basted with barbecue sauce.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Black Tiger prawns cooked and tossed in BBQ sauce. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Large, flavorful Black Tiger prawns with a delicious BBQ glaze.

appetizer.name: Jumbo BBQ Prawn Skewers
appetizer.description: Large, succulent jumbo prawns (shrimp) threaded onto skewers, marinated or basted with a flavorful barbecue sauce, then grilled until perfectly cooked with a slight char.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Jumbo prawns grilled on skewers with BBQ sauce. Please inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Plump and flavorful jumbo BBQ prawn skewers. (Values per skewer, approx 3-4 prawns).

appetizer.name: Spanakopita - House made phyllo dough pouches stuffed with spinach, greens, herbs, and feta cheese
appetizer.description: A classic Greek savory pie or individual pouches made with flaky, house-made phyllo dough, filled with a mixture of spinach, various greens (like chard or leeks), fresh herbs (dill, parsley), and tangy feta cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (feta cheese, butter if used in phyllo)
CONTAINS_EGG (if used as binder in filling)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Savory spinach and feta pie in flaky phyllo pastry. Contains wheat and dairy. Please inquire if egg is used in the filling.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Crispy, flaky, and flavorful spinach and feta phyllo pie. (Values per typical triangular portion).

appetizer.name: Octapodi - Spanish octopus slowly braised and served simply with lemon juice, EVOO, and fresh oregano
appetizer.description: Tender Spanish octopus, slowly braised to perfection, then often finished on the grill for a slight char. Served in a classic Greek style, dressed simply with fresh lemon juice, extra virgin olive oil (EVOO), and fresh oregano.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Octopus braised until tender, then typically grilled and dressed with lemon, olive oil, and oregano.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful braised and grilled octopus, a Greek delicacy. (Values per 100g serving).

appetizer.name: Dakos Bread Salad - Fresh tomatoes, barley rusks, feta, capers, onion, oregano, and basil
appetizer.description: Dakos (or Ntakos) is a traditional Cretan salad or meze. It features a base of Paximadia (hard barley rusks) that are lightly moistened, then topped with grated or chopped fresh tomatoes, crumbled feta or mizithra cheese, capers, red onion, olives (often), and fresh herbs like oregano and basil, all drizzled with extra virgin olive oil.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (barley rusks often contain wheat flour as well)
appetizer.preparationNotes: A Cretan salad built on barley rusks, topped with tomatoes, feta, and herbs. Contains gluten and dairy.
appetizer.customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful Cretan bread salad with fresh toppings.

appetizer.name: Vine-Ripened Tomato & Fresh Mozzarella Caprese with Balsamic Glaze
appetizer.description: A simple Italian salad, made of sliced fresh mozzarella, ripe vine-ripened tomatoes, and sweet basil, seasoned with salt and olive oil, and finished with a drizzle of rich balsamic glaze.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Classic Caprese salad with fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, basil, and balsamic glaze. Contains dairy and sulphites.
appetizer.customerGuidance: A fresh and elegant display of Italian flavors.

appetizer.name: Bacon wrapped Asparagus
appetizer.description: Fresh asparagus spears wrapped in savory bacon strips, then typically roasted, grilled, or pan-fried until the bacon is crispy and the asparagus is tender-crisp.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Asparagus spears wrapped in bacon and cooked until bacon is crisp.
appetizer.customerGuidance: A classic pairing of tender asparagus and crispy bacon. (Values per approx. 3-4 spears).

appetizer.name: Falafel
appetizer.description: Crispy, deep-fried balls or patties made from ground chickpeas (or fava beans), fresh herbs like parsley and cilantro, and spices. A popular Middle Eastern street food.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (potentially, if flour is used as a binder, please inquire)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Deep-fried spiced chickpea patties. Often gluten-free, but please confirm if flour is used in the mixture.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Crispy and flavorful chickpea fritters. (Values per falafel ball).

appetizer.name: Garlic-Lime Sautéed Shrimp
appetizer.description: Succulent shrimp quickly sautéed in olive oil or butter with minced garlic and a generous squeeze of fresh lime juice, often finished with fresh cilantro or parsley.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if cooked with butter, please inquire)
appetizer.preparationNotes: Shrimp sautéed with garlic and lime. Ask if butter is used if dairy is a concern.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Zesty and flavorful garlic-lime shrimp. (Values per 100g serving).

appetizer.name: Smoked Pork Belly Burnt Ends
appetizer.description: Cubes of rich pork belly, slow-smoked until tender, then often tossed in a sweet and tangy BBQ sauce or glaze and returned to the smoker or oven to caramelize, creating flavorful 'burnt ends'.
appetizer.preparationNotes: Tender, smoky, and caramelized cubes of pork belly. Inquire about BBQ sauce ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
appetizer.customerGuidance: Indulgent bites of smoky, caramelized pork belly. (Values per 2-3 pieces/small serving).

appetizer.name: Cheese and Fruit Grazing Board
appetizer.description: An attractively arranged platter featuring a selection of cheeses, fresh seasonal fruits, and often accompanied by crackers or breadsticks.
appetizer.preparationNotes: A shareable platter with diverse flavors and textures. Gluten-free if served with GF crackers. Nut content varies.
appetizer.customerGuidance: A delightful assortment of cheeses and fresh fruits. Crackers may contain gluten; nuts may be present.

appetizer.name: Meat Cheese and Fruit Grazing Board
appetizer.description: An abundant platter featuring a selection of cured meats, assorted cheeses, fresh seasonal fruits, and often crackers, nuts, and olives.
appetizer.preparationNotes: A charcuterie-style board offering a variety of savory and sweet items. Gluten-free if served with GF crackers. Nut content varies.
suitableForDiets: KETO_FRIENDLY (with careful selection, without crackers/high-sugar fruits)
appetizer.customerGuidance: A lavish spread of cured meats, cheeses, and fruits. Crackers may contain gluten; nuts may be present.

entree.name: Chicken Cacciatore with Mushrooms, Peppers & Onions
entree.description: A rustic Italian 'hunter-style' chicken stew, braised with onions, herbs, tomatoes, often bell peppers, and sometimes wine.
entree.preparationNotes: Chicken braised in a hearty tomato-based sauce with vegetables like mushrooms, peppers, and onions.
entree.customerGuidance: A flavorful and rustic 'hunter-style' chicken stew with simmered vegetables.

entree.name: Chicken Parmesan White with Sun-dried Tomato & White Wine Cream Sauce
entree.description: A variation of Chicken Parmesan featuring breaded chicken cutlets with a creamy white wine sauce, sun-dried tomatoes, and Parmesan cheese.
entree.preparationNotes: Breaded chicken in a creamy white wine and sun-dried tomato sauce, topped with Parmesan.
entree.customerGuidance: A rich take on Chicken Parmesan with a luscious white wine cream sauce and sun-dried tomatoes.

entree.name: Chicken Parmesan Red with Mozzarella & Tomato Sauce
entree.description: The classic Chicken Parmesan: breaded chicken cutlets topped with tomato sauce and mozzarella cheese, then baked until bubbly.
entree.preparationNotes: Breaded chicken cutlet baked with tomato sauce and mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses.
entree.customerGuidance: The beloved classic: crispy chicken, tangy tomato sauce, and melted mozzarella.

entree.name: Chicken Marsala with Mushrooms & Creamy Marsala Wine Sauce
entree.description: An Italian-American dish of chicken cutlets braised in a rich sauce made with Marsala wine and mushrooms. Can be creamy or not.
entree.preparationNotes: Pan-fried chicken in a savory Marsala wine and mushroom sauce, often with cream.
entree.customerGuidance: Tender chicken in a rich, earthy mushroom and Marsala wine sauce.

entree.name: Chicken Puttanesca with Olives, Capers & Anchovies (Moderately Spicy)
entree.description: Chicken cooked in a vibrant and piquant Puttanesca sauce, typically made with tomatoes, olives, capers, anchovies, garlic, and chili flakes.
entree.preparationNotes: Chicken simmered in a zesty tomato sauce with olives, capers, anchovies, and a hint of spice.
entree.customerGuidance: A boldly flavored chicken dish with a tangy, savory, and slightly spicy tomato sauce.

entree.name: BBQ Guinness Chicken
entree.description: Chicken pieces, typically thighs or breasts, marinated and glazed with a unique BBQ sauce infused with Guinness stout, offering rich, malty, and smoky flavors.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in Worcestershire or BBQ sauce base)
entree.preparationNotes: Chicken cooked with a BBQ sauce featuring Guinness stout, which contains gluten (barley). Worcestershire sauce often contains anchovies and soy.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful chicken with a rich, malty Guinness-infused BBQ sauce.

entree.name: Carolina BBQ Chicken
entree.description: Chicken, often smoked or grilled, coated in a tangy, vinegar-based Carolina-style barbecue sauce, which can range from thin and peppery (Eastern style) to slightly sweet with ketchup or mustard (Lexington or SC style).
entree.preparationNotes: Chicken prepared with a tangy, vinegar-forward Carolina BBQ sauce. Typically gluten-free, but inquire if unsure about specific sauce ingredients.
entree.customerGuidance: Tangy and savory Carolina-style BBQ chicken.

entree.name: Rotisserie Chicken
entree.description: Whole chicken seasoned and slow-cooked on a rotisserie, resulting in moist, tender meat and crispy skin.
entree.preparationNotes: Chicken slow-cooked on a rotating spit. Seasonings are typically simple and allergen-friendly, but confirm if concerned.
entree.customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful rotisserie chicken. (Values per approx. 100g serving, mixed meat).

entree.name: Kotopoulo lemonato - Aromatic and lemony baked chicken with fresh herbs
entree.description: A classic Greek dish of tender chicken pieces (often bone-in, skin-on) baked until golden with a vibrant, aromatic sauce of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, oregano, and other fresh herbs. Potatoes are often roasted alongside the chicken.
entree.preparationNotes: Chicken baked with a zesty lemon, garlic, and herb sauce. Often served with roasted potatoes cooked in the same pan.
suitableForDiets: PALEO_FRIENDLY (if no/minimal added sugar in broth if used)
entree.customerGuidance: Bright, flavorful, and tender lemon-herb baked chicken.

entree.name: Signature BBQ Glazed Chicken Quarters
entree.description: Chicken leg quarters (thigh and drumstick), slow-cooked or grilled, and generously basted with a signature sweet, smoky, or tangy BBQ glaze until tender and caramelized.
entree.preparationNotes: Juicy chicken quarters with a signature BBQ glaze. Please inquire about glaze ingredients for specific allergen concerns.
entree.customerGuidance: Tender chicken quarters smothered in our signature BBQ glaze. (Values per quarter).

entree.name: Herb Rotisserie Chicken
entree.description: Whole chicken seasoned generously with a blend of aromatic herbs (such as rosemary, thyme, oregano), garlic, salt, and pepper, then slow-cooked on a rotisserie for exceptionally moist, tender meat and crispy, flavorful skin.
entree.preparationNotes: Chicken slow-cooked on a rotisserie with an aromatic herb seasoning.
entree.customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful herb-infused rotisserie chicken. (Values per 100g serving, mixed meat).

entree.name: Lemon-Herb Marinated Chicken Kebabs
entree.description: Tender pieces of chicken breast marinated in a zesty mixture of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and fresh herbs like oregano, thyme, and parsley, then grilled on skewers until perfectly cooked.
entree.preparationNotes: Juicy grilled chicken infused with bright lemon and aromatic herbs.
entree.customerGuidance: Bright, flavorful, and healthy lemon-herb chicken kebabs.

entree.name: Beef Pizzaiola with Cremini Mushrooms, Peppers & Oregano
entree.description: Beef (often tougher cuts) simmered until tender in a flavorful tomato sauce resembling pizza sauce, with mushrooms, peppers, oregano, and garlic.
entree.preparationNotes: Slow-cooked beef in a rich, pizza-style tomato sauce with mushrooms and peppers.
entree.customerGuidance: Tender beef simmered in a savory tomato, mushroom, and pepper sauce with Italian herbs.

entree.name: Beef Braciole with Parmesan, Salami & Herb Stuffing
entree.description: Thin slices of beef rolled around a savory stuffing (typically breadcrumbs, Parmesan, salami or prosciutto, herbs, garlic) and simmered in tomato sauce.
entree.preparationNotes: Rolled beef stuffed with cheese, cured meat, and herbs, slow-cooked in tomato sauce.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful beef rolls stuffed with a savory mixture, simmered in rich tomato sauce.

entree.name: Brasato Al Barolo with Barolo Wine & Tomato
entree.description: A classic Piedmontese dish of beef (typically chuck roast or similar) slow-braised in Barolo wine with vegetables and often tomato until meltingly tender.
entree.preparationNotes: Beef slow-braised in Barolo wine and tomatoes until exceptionally tender.
entree.customerGuidance: Luxuriously tender beef braised in rich Barolo wine, a true taste of Piedmont.

entree.name: Guinness Braised Boneless Short Ribs
entree.description: Boneless beef short ribs slow-braised in Guinness stout beer along with aromatic vegetables (like onions, carrots, celery) and herbs, resulting in exceptionally tender meat with a rich, deep-flavored sauce.
entree.preparationNotes: Boneless short ribs slow-braised in Guinness stout with aromatic vegetables until meltingly tender.
entree.customerGuidance: Incredibly tender short ribs braised in rich Guinness stout for a deep, savory flavor.

entree.name: Bacon Wrapped Fillet Mignon
entree.description: Tender fillet mignon steak, a prime cut of beef, wrapped in savory bacon and typically grilled or pan-seared to achieve a juicy interior and crispy bacon exterior.
entree.preparationNotes: Beef tenderloin wrapped with bacon, commonly grilled or pan-seared. Cooked to order.
entree.customerGuidance: A luxurious and flavorful classic, combining tender beef with smoky bacon.

entree.name: Flank Steak with Chimichurri
entree.description: Grilled or pan-seared flank steak, a flavorful and relatively lean cut of beef, served with a vibrant, zesty Argentinian chimichurri sauce made from fresh parsley, garlic, vinegar, olive oil, and chili flakes.
entree.preparationNotes: Flank steak typically marinated and grilled, sliced against the grain, and topped with fresh chimichurri sauce.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful grilled steak paired with a zesty, herbaceous Argentinian sauce.

entree.name: Kokinisto - Boneless short rib slowly cooked in cinnamon-scented tomato sauce
entree.description: A traditional Greek comfort dish, Kokinisto features tender boneless beef short ribs braised slowly in a rich, aromatic tomato sauce, characteristically scented with cinnamon, cloves, and other warm spices.
entree.preparationNotes: Beef short ribs slow-cooked until meltingly tender in a cinnamon-spiced tomato sauce. Typically served over rice, pasta, or potatoes.
entree.customerGuidance: Tender, aromatic short ribs in a classic Greek cinnamon-tomato sauce.

entree.name: Bifteki Gemisto - Aromatic oven-baked minced beef 'burgers', stuffed with cheese and topped with tomato relish
entree.description: A popular Greek dish of seasoned minced beef patties (biftekia) that are stuffed with cheese (often feta or a melting cheese like kasseri), then oven-baked or grilled. Typically served with a fresh tomato relish or sauce.
entree.preparationNotes: Seasoned beef patties stuffed with cheese, baked or grilled, and served with tomato relish. Please inquire if breadcrumbs or egg are used.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful Greek-style beef patties with a melted cheese center.

entree.name: Beef Tenderloin & Bell Pepper Kebabs
entree.description: Premium cuts of beef tenderloin and colorful bell pepper chunks marinated and grilled on skewers for a tender, juicy, and flavorful kebab.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SOY (if soy sauce used)
May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if soy sauce/Worcestershire used)
entree.preparationNotes: Tender, high-quality beef with sweet bell peppers, simply grilled. Gluten status depends on marinade.
entree.customerGuidance: Luxurious and flavorful beef tenderloin and pepper kebabs.

entree.name: Lasagna with Beef, Pork & Ricotta
entree.description: Classic Italian-American baked pasta dish with layers of wide lasagna noodles, rich meat sauce (beef and pork), ricotta cheese, mozzarella, and Parmesan.
entree.preparationNotes: Layered pasta with meat sauce, ricotta, mozzarella, and Parmesan, baked until golden.
entree.customerGuidance: A hearty and satisfying classic lasagna layered with rich meat sauce and cheeses.

entree.name: Penne alla Vodka with a Creamy Tomato Sauce
entree.description: A classic Italian-American pasta dish featuring penne pasta tossed in a rich and creamy tomato sauce that is brightened with a splash of vodka, often finished with Parmesan cheese and fresh basil or parsley.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (cream, Parmesan cheese, butter if used)
entree.preparationNotes: Penne pasta in a creamy tomato sauce with a hint of vodka. Contains wheat and dairy. Alcohol is cooked but trace amounts might remain.
entree.customerGuidance: A rich and satisfying pasta dish with a velvety vodka-infused tomato cream sauce.

entree.name: Fettuccine Alfredo enhanced with Black Truffle Oil
entree.description: A luxurious take on the classic Fettuccine Alfredo. Fresh fettuccine pasta is coated in a rich and creamy sauce made from butter, heavy cream, and Parmesan cheese, elevated with the aromatic essence of black truffle oil.
entree.preparationNotes: Indulgent fettuccine in a creamy Alfredo sauce with black truffle oil. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
entree.customerGuidance: An exceptionally rich and aromatic truffle Alfredo pasta experience.

entree.name: Italian Meatballs
entree.description: Classic Italian-American meatballs, typically made from ground beef and/or pork, breadcrumbs, Parmesan cheese, eggs, and herbs, simmered in tomato sauce.
entree.preparationNotes: Savory ground meat meatballs simmered in tomato sauce.
entree.customerGuidance: Tender and flavorful Italian meatballs, perfect for any occasion.

entree.name: Osso Bucco with Root Vegetables & Red Wine
entree.description: A Milanese specialty of cross-cut veal shanks braised with vegetables, white wine, and broth. Often garnished with gremolata.
entree.preparationNotes: Slow-braised veal shanks with root vegetables in a wine-infused broth.
entree.customerGuidance: Tender, fall-off-the-bone veal shanks in a rich, savory sauce with vegetables.

entree.name: Veal Saltimbocca with Prosciutto & Sage
entree.description: The traditional Saltimbocca made with veal cutlets, prosciutto, and fresh sage, pan-fried and often finished with a white wine and butter sauce.
entree.preparationNotes: Veal cutlets layered with prosciutto and sage, pan-fried to perfection.
entree.customerGuidance: An elegant Italian classic: tender veal with savory prosciutto and aromatic sage.

entree.name: Pesce All'Acqua Pazza (Poached Halibut) with Tomatoes, Capers & Lemon
entree.description: 'Fish in crazy water' - a Neapolitan dish of white fish (here, halibut) gently poached in a light, flavorful broth of cherry tomatoes, garlic, parsley, white wine, and a hint of chili.
entree.preparationNotes: Halibut poached in a light, aromatic broth with fresh tomatoes, capers, and lemon.
entree.customerGuidance: Delicate poached halibut in a vibrant, light 'crazy water' broth with tomatoes and capers.

entree.name: Salmon steak
entree.description: A thick cut of salmon, typically grilled, pan-seared, or baked, often seasoned simply to highlight its natural flavor.
entree.preparationNotes: Salmon steak cooked to order. Typically seasoned lightly. Check for any accompanying sauces.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful and flaky salmon steak, rich in Omega-3s. (Values per approx. 6oz/170g serving).

entree.name: Psari Plaki - Oven-baked fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
entree.description: A traditional Greek baked fish dish. Psari Plaki features fish fillets (often a firm white fish like cod, snapper, or porgy) baked with a generous topping of sliced tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and fresh herbs like parsley and oregano.
entree.preparationNotes: Fish fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and flavorful dish.
entree.customerGuidance: Delicate baked fish with fresh Mediterranean flavors.

entree.name: Brizola Solomou - Grilled salmon steaks with fresh herbs, lemon, and evoo
entree.description: Grilled salmon steaks (Brizola Solomou) prepared in a classic Greek style, seasoned with fresh herbs (like oregano, thyme, or dill), fresh lemon juice, and extra virgin olive oil (EVOO).
entree.preparationNotes: Salmon steaks grilled and seasoned with lemon, olive oil, and fresh Greek herbs.
entree.customerGuidance: Healthy and delicious grilled salmon with classic Greek seasonings.

entree.name: Bakaliaros Plaki - Oven-baked Cod fish fillet topped with fresh tomato slices, onion, and fresh herbs
entree.description: Bakaliaros Plaki is a Greek baked cod dish. Cod fish fillets are topped with sliced fresh tomatoes, onions, garlic, olive oil, and aromatic fresh herbs like parsley and oregano, then baked until tender and flavorful.
entree.preparationNotes: Cod fillets baked with a savory topping of tomatoes, onions, and herbs. A light and healthy option.
entree.customerGuidance: Tender baked cod with fresh tomato and herb topping.

entree.name: Pan-Seared Salmon with a Delicate Lemon-Dill Sauce
entree.description: Succulent salmon fillet, pan-seared to achieve a crispy skin and moist interior, served with a light and refreshing lemon-dill sauce, often made with butter, white wine, fresh dill, and lemon.
entree.preparationNotes: Pan-seared salmon with a buttery lemon-dill sauce. Contains dairy and potentially sulphites from wine.
entree.customerGuidance: Perfectly seared salmon with a bright and herbaceous lemon-dill sauce.

entree.name: Cedar Plank Roasted Salmon with dill
entree.description: Salmon fillet roasted on a cedar plank, which infuses the fish with a unique smoky flavor. Typically seasoned simply with salt, pepper, lemon, and fresh dill to complement the cedar notes.
entree.preparationNotes: Salmon roasted on a cedar plank for a smoky flavor, seasoned with dill.
entree.customerGuidance: Aromatic cedar plank salmon with a delicate dill accent. (Values per 150-180g serving).

entree.name: Spinach and Ricotta Cannelloni
entree.description: Pasta tubes (cannelloni) filled with a creamy mixture of spinach and ricotta cheese, typically baked in tomato sauce (or béchamel) and topped with Parmesan.
entree.preparationNotes: Pasta tubes filled with spinach and ricotta, baked in sauce with cheese.
entree.customerGuidance: Comforting baked cannelloni filled with creamy spinach and ricotta cheese.

entree.name: Vegetarian Lasagna with Artichoke Hearts & Bechamel Sauce
entree.description: A vegetarian take on lasagna, layered with pasta, artichoke hearts, other vegetables (e.g., spinach, mushrooms), ricotta or other cheeses, and a creamy béchamel sauce.
entree.preparationNotes: Layered pasta with artichoke hearts, vegetables, cheeses, and creamy béchamel sauce.
entree.customerGuidance: A delicious vegetarian lasagna with artichokes and a rich béchamel sauce.

entree.name: Tomato & Gnocchi- with pesto
entree.description: Soft potato gnocchi served with fresh tomatoes (such as cherry or diced) and a vibrant basil pesto sauce. A flavorful vegetarian pasta dish.
entree.preparationNotes: Soft potato gnocchi tossed with tomatoes and basil pesto. Contains wheat, dairy, and pine nuts. Egg is commonly used in gnocchi.
entree.customerGuidance: A delightful dish of soft gnocchi, fresh tomatoes, and aromatic pesto.

entree.name: Eggplant Parmesan
entree.description: A classic Italian-American dish with layers of fried or baked eggplant slices, tomato sauce, mozzarella, Parmesan, and basil.
entree.preparationNotes: Layers of eggplant, tomato sauce, and cheeses, baked until bubbly.
entree.customerGuidance: Comforting and classic eggplant Parmesan with rich tomato sauce and melted cheese.

entree.name: Grilled Halloumi & Vegetable Kebabs (Vegetarian)
entree.description: Vegetarian skewers featuring cubes of salty halloumi cheese and a colorful array of seasonal vegetables like bell peppers, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and red onion, grilled until the halloumi is golden and the vegetables are tender-crisp.
entree.preparationNotes: Salty grilled halloumi paired with sweet, charred vegetables.
entree.customerGuidance: A delicious vegetarian option: grilled halloumi and colorful vegetable kebabs.

entree.name: Tossed Italian Cobb Salad
entree.description: An Italian twist on the classic Cobb salad, typically featuring mixed greens, grilled chicken or salami, hard-boiled eggs, tomatoes, avocado, olives, and an Italian vinaigrette.
entree.preparationNotes: A hearty salad with Italian meats/chicken, eggs, vegetables, and vinaigrette.
entree.customerGuidance: A substantial and flavorful Italian-inspired Cobb salad.

entree.name: Cabbage Rolls with rice, dried figs, pine nuts, and aromatic herbs
entree.description: Tender cabbage leaves wrapped around a savory filling of rice, dried figs, toasted pine nuts, and aromatic herbs, often simmered in a light broth or tomato sauce.
entree.preparationNotes: Cabbage leaves stuffed with a fragrant mixture of rice, figs, pine nuts, and herbs.
entree.customerGuidance: Delicate cabbage rolls with a unique sweet and savory filling.

entree.name: Eggplant Imam Baildi, sumptuously topped with stewed tomato and peppers
entree.description: A classic Turkish dish where eggplants are slit and stuffed with a mixture of onions, garlic, tomatoes, peppers, and various spices, then slowly baked in olive oil until very tender. The name famously means 'the Imam fainted', supposedly due to its deliciousness or the amount of olive oil used.
entree.preparationNotes: Slow-baked eggplants stuffed with a rich filling of tomatoes, onions, garlic, and peppers in olive oil.
entree.customerGuidance: Melt-in-your-mouth eggplant stuffed with a savory tomato and vegetable mixture, a Turkish classic.

entree.name: Indian Style Stuffed Peppers with fragrant curried chickpeas
entree.description: Bell peppers stuffed with a flavorful Indian-spiced mixture, typically featuring curried chickpeas, rice or quinoa, vegetables like onions and tomatoes, and aromatic spices.
entree.preparationNotes: Bell peppers filled with a fragrant, curried chickpea and vegetable stuffing.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful Indian-spiced stuffed peppers with a hearty curried chickpea filling.

entree.name: Stuffed Portabella Mushrooms with hearty stewed lentils
entree.description: Large portabella mushroom caps roasted or grilled and filled with a savory and hearty stuffing of stewed lentils, vegetables, and herbs.
entree.preparationNotes: Portabella mushrooms filled with a savory stewed lentil and vegetable mixture.
entree.customerGuidance: Meaty portabella mushrooms with a satisfying and flavorful lentil stuffing.

entree.name: Wild Rice Stuffed Acorn Squash, a harvest delight
entree.description: Roasted acorn squash halves filled with a flavorful stuffing of wild rice, often mixed with other ingredients like cranberries, pecans, mushrooms, onions, celery, and herbs.
entree.preparationNotes: Roasted acorn squash filled with a savory wild rice, fruit, and nut stuffing.
entree.customerGuidance: A festive and flavorful stuffed acorn squash, perfect for a hearty meal.

entree.name: Greek Style Stuffed Peppers with aromatic jasmine rice
entree.description: Bell peppers (Yemistes) filled with a savory Greek-inspired mixture of aromatic jasmine rice, onions, tomatoes, fresh herbs like parsley and mint, and sometimes raisins or pine nuts, then baked.
entree.preparationNotes: Bell peppers stuffed with aromatic rice, tomatoes, and fresh Greek herbs.
entree.customerGuidance: Classic Greek stuffed peppers with a fragrant and herby rice filling.

entree.name: Artichoke Ala Polita with a vibrant lemon tahini sauce
entree.description: A Greek dish ('Artichokes a la City style') where artichoke hearts are stewed with potatoes, carrots, onions, dill, and lemon juice. This version adds a lemon tahini sauce for extra vibrancy.
entree.category: Main Course - Vegetarian / Vegan / Side Dish
entree.preparationNotes: Stewed artichokes with potatoes and carrots, served with a lemon tahini sauce.
entree.customerGuidance: A hearty Greek artichoke stew brightened with a zesty lemon tahini sauce.

entree.name: Fasolakia (Greek green beans stewed with tomatoes)
entree.description: A traditional Greek vegetarian dish (Fasolakia Lathera) where fresh green beans are braised in olive oil with ripe tomatoes, onions, garlic, potatoes (often), and herbs like parsley or dill until very tender.
entree.category: Main Course - Vegetarian / Vegan / Side Dish
entree.preparationNotes: Green beans and often potatoes slow-cooked in a rich tomato and olive oil sauce.
entree.customerGuidance: Comforting Greek stewed green beans in a savory tomato and olive oil base.

entree.name: Spicy Tofu Vindaloo, full of bold flavors
entree.description: A vegetarian/vegan take on the fiery Goan curry, Vindaloo, made with firm tofu marinated and simmered in a spicy and tangy sauce of vinegar, garlic, ginger, chilies, and a blend of aromatic spices.
entree.preparationNotes: Tofu simmered in a very spicy and tangy Vindaloo curry sauce.
entree.customerGuidance: A fiery and flavorful tofu Vindaloo for those who love a spicy kick.

entree.name: Vegan Moussaka with stewed lentils and creamy cauliflower béchamel
entree.description: A plant-based version of the classic Greek layered casserole Moussaka. This version features layers of potatoes, eggplant, a rich stewed lentil ragu, and is topped with a creamy dairy-free béchamel sauce made from cauliflower.
entree.preparationNotes: Layered casserole of eggplant, potatoes, spiced lentil ragu, and creamy cauliflower béchamel.
entree.customerGuidance: A hearty and comforting vegan Moussaka with rich lentils and a creamy cauliflower topping.

entree.name: Stuffed Poblano Peppers with savory rice and beans
entree.description: Mild poblano peppers roasted and stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, black beans, corn, tomatoes, onions, and spices, often topped with cheese or a vegan alternative.
entree.preparationNotes: Roasted poblano peppers filled with a flavorful rice, bean, and corn mixture.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful and satisfying stuffed poblano peppers with a savory rice and bean filling.

entree.name: Moroccan Wild Rice Pilaf with dried fruits and nuts
entree.description: A fragrant wild rice pilaf infused with Moroccan flavors, featuring ingredients like dried fruits (apricots, raisins, dates), toasted nuts (almonds, pistachios), onions, garlic, and warm spices (cinnamon, cumin, turmeric, ginger).
entree.preparationNotes: Aromatic wild rice pilaf with Moroccan spices, dried fruits, and nuts.
entree.customerGuidance: An exotic and flavorful Moroccan wild rice pilaf with sweet and savory notes.

entree.name: Crispy Falafel with tahini drizzle
entree.description: Deep-fried balls or patties made from ground chickpeas and/or fava beans, herbs, and spices. Served crispy, often with a drizzle of tahini sauce.
allergenAlerts: POTENTIAL_WHEAT (if wheat flour used as binder, verify if chickpea flour only)
entree.preparationNotes: Crispy fried patties of ground chickpeas and herbs, served with tahini sauce.
entree.customerGuidance: Deliciously crispy falafel made from chickpeas and herbs, drizzled with tahini. (Nutritional values approximate per piece)

entree.name: Kale and Quinoa Salad with lemon-tahini dressing
entree.description: A nutritious salad combining hearty kale (often massaged), cooked quinoa, and other additions like chickpeas, avocado, nuts, or seeds, all tossed in a creamy lemon-tahini dressing.
entree.preparationNotes: Nutrient-dense salad with kale, quinoa, and a creamy lemon-tahini dressing.
entree.customerGuidance: A wholesome and satisfying kale and quinoa salad with a zesty lemon-tahini dressing.

entree.name: Barbacoa
entree.description: Traditionally, barbacoa refers to meat (often beef, lamb, or goat) slow-cooked until tender, typically seasoned with chilies and spices. In modern Mexican-American cuisine, beef barbacoa often involves beef cheeks or chuck roast slow-cooked with chipotle peppers, cumin, cloves, and other seasonings.
entree.preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender, and flavorful shredded beef seasoned with chilies and spices.
entree.customerGuidance: Rich, savory, and tender slow-cooked barbacoa beef. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

entree.name: Pork Carnitas
entree.description: A Mexican dish of pork (often shoulder or butt) slow-cooked until very tender, then typically shredded and crisped up. Seasoned with ingredients like oranges, lime, onion, garlic, and spices.
entree.preparationNotes: Slow-cooked, tender, and crispy shredded pork with citrus and spice notes.
entree.customerGuidance: Juicy and flavorful slow-cooked pork carnitas. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

entree.name: Pork Belly
entree.description: A boneless cut of fatty meat from the belly of a pig. When cooked (e.g., roasted, braised, seared), it's known for its rich flavor, tender meat, and often crispy skin.
entree.preparationNotes: Rich and succulent pork belly, preparation style varies.
entree.customerGuidance: Indulgent and flavorful pork belly. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz, can vary significantly)

entree.name: Flank steak Fajitas
entree.description: A popular Tex-Mex dish consisting of grilled strips of marinated flank steak, typically served sizzling with sautéed bell peppers and onions. Often accompanied by tortillas, salsa, guacamole, and sour cream.
dietaryFlags: GLUTEN_FREE_OPTION (if served without flour tortillas or with corn tortillas)
entree.preparationNotes: Grilled marinated flank steak strips with sautéed peppers and onions.
entree.customerGuidance: Sizzling flank steak fajitas with colorful peppers and onions. (Nutritional values for steak & vegetables, excludes tortillas/sides)

entree.name: Ground Beef
entree.description: Seasoned cooked ground beef, often served as a protein option for tacos, bowls, or salads. Seasonings typically include chili powder, cumin, garlic, and onion powder.
entree.preparationNotes: Seasoned and cooked ground beef.
entree.customerGuidance: Savory seasoned ground beef. (Nutritional values per serving, e.g., 4oz)

entree.name: Chorizo
