entree.customerGuidance: A taste of California with fries and avocado in your breakfast burrito.

entree.name: Breakfast Burrito- The Greek (vegetarian)
entree.description: A vegetarian breakfast burrito inspired by Greek flavors, typically containing scrambled eggs, feta cheese, spinach, tomatoes, onions, and Kalamata olives, wrapped in a flour tortilla.
entree.preparationNotes: A Mediterranean twist on the breakfast burrito with classic Greek vegetable and feta cheese fillings.
entree.customerGuidance: A refreshing vegetarian burrito with spinach, feta, and Mediterranean vegetables.

entree.name: Croisandwich - Caprese (Vegetarian)
entree.description: A flaky croissant sandwich filled with classic Caprese ingredients: fresh mozzarella, ripe tomatoes, and basil, often drizzled with balsamic glaze.
entree.preparationNotes: A light and flavorful vegetarian option featuring mozzarella, tomato, and basil in a buttery croissant.
entree.customerGuidance: A delightful Italian-inspired vegetarian croissant sandwich.

entree.name: Croisandwich - Egg salad
entree.description: A croissant filled with creamy egg salad, typically made with chopped hard-boiled eggs, mayonnaise, and seasonings.
entree.preparationNotes: Classic egg salad served in a buttery croissant.
entree.customerGuidance: A comforting classic: creamy egg salad nestled in a flaky croissant.

entree.name: Croisandwich - Turkey Club
entree.description: A club-style sandwich served on a croissant, featuring sliced turkey, bacon, lettuce, tomato, and mayonnaise.
entree.preparationNotes: A classic turkey club combination served in a croissant for a richer taste.
entree.customerGuidance: A delicious and satisfying turkey club with a buttery croissant upgrade.

entree.name: Croisandwich - Gravlax (Cured Salmon)
entree.description: An elegant croissant sandwich featuring gravlax (Scandinavian cured salmon), often accompanied by cream cheese, dill, and sometimes capers or red onion.
entree.preparationNotes: Delicate cured salmon and cream cheese on a flaky croissant for a sophisticated choice.
entree.customerGuidance: A luxurious croissant with thinly sliced cured salmon and cream cheese.

entree.name: Quiche - Lorraine
entree.description: A classic French tart consisting of a pastry crust filled with a savory custard made from eggs, cream, bacon, and often Swiss or Gruyère cheese.
entree.preparationNotes: A rich and savory egg custard tart with bacon and cheese in a buttery crust.
entree.customerGuidance: The quintessential French quiche, rich with bacon, eggs, and cheese.

entree.name: Quiche - Greek (Vegetarian)
entree.description: A vegetarian quiche with Greek-inspired fillings such as spinach, feta cheese, Kalamata olives, tomatoes, and herbs, in a savory egg custard and pastry crust.
entree.preparationNotes: A flavorful vegetarian quiche featuring spinach, feta, olives, and other Mediterranean ingredients.
entree.customerGuidance: Enjoy Mediterranean flavors in this hearty vegetarian spinach and feta quiche.

entree.name: Mexican Quiche
entree.description: A quiche with Mexican-inspired flavors, often including ingredients like chorizo, jalapeños, cilantro, corn, black beans, and pepper jack or cheddar cheese in an egg custard base.
entree.preparationNotes: A zesty quiche with Southwestern flair, often including spicy elements like chorizo and jalapeños.
entree.customerGuidance: A lively quiche with Mexican spices, chorizo, and vegetables.

entree.name: Quiche - Denver
entree.description: A quiche inspired by the Denver omelet, typically featuring ham, bell peppers (often green), onions, and cheddar cheese in an egg custard and pastry crust.
entree.preparationNotes: Classic Denver omelet ingredients baked into a savory quiche.
entree.customerGuidance: All the flavors of a Denver omelet in a delicious quiche.

entree.name: Omelet Bar
entree.description: A customizable omelet station where fresh omelets are prepared to order with a variety of fillings.
entree.preparationNotes: Cooked-to-order omelets. Nutritional information and allergens depend heavily on chosen fillings. Butter may be used for cooking.
entree.customerGuidance: Create your perfect omelet! Choose from a variety of fresh fillings. (Nutrition varies with choices)

entree.name: Sausage Patties
entree.description: Savory seasoned ground meat (typically pork) formed into round patties and cooked until browned and cooked through. Usually served as two patties.
entree.preparationNotes: Classic breakfast sausage patties. Check for gluten content if sensitive, as some brands use fillers. Assumed 2 patties for nutrition.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful pork sausage patties, a breakfast favorite. (Nutrition for 2 patties)

entree.name: Turkey Bacon
entree.description: A leaner alternative to traditional pork bacon, made from cured, smoked, and sliced turkey meat.
entree.preparationNotes: Typically pan-fried or baked until crispy. Often contains nitrites. Assumed 2-3 slices for nutrition.
entree.customerGuidance: A leaner bacon alternative made from turkey. (Nutrition for 2-3 slices)

entree.name: Vegan Bacon
entree.description: A plant-based alternative to traditional bacon, designed to mimic its smoky flavor and crispy texture.
entree.preparationNotes: Plant-based bacon alternative. Check ingredients for specific allergens. Assumed 2-3 strips for nutrition.
entree.customerGuidance: A smoky and savory plant-based bacon alternative. (Nutrition for 2-3 strips, varies by type)

entree.name: Pancakes (with syrups)
entree.description: Fluffy, griddled cakes made from batter, typically served in a stack with butter and assorted syrups.
entree.preparationNotes: Classic American pancakes. Nutrition for a serving of 2-3 medium pancakes with syrup.
entree.customerGuidance: A stack of fluffy pancakes served with your choice of syrup.

entree.name: Waffles (with syrups)
entree.description: Crisp and tender waffles made from batter cooked in a waffle iron, typically served with butter and assorted syrups.
entree.preparationNotes: Classic breakfast waffles. Nutrition for one large waffle with syrup.
entree.customerGuidance: Crispy golden waffles served with your choice of syrup.

entree.name: French toast (with syrups)
entree.description: Slices of bread soaked in an egg and milk mixture, then pan-fried until golden brown. Served with butter and assorted syrups, often dusted with powdered sugar.
entree.preparationNotes: Classic eggy French toast. Nutrition for 2 slices with syrup.
entree.customerGuidance: Rich and delicious French toast, served with syrup.

entree.name: Salami
entree.description: A type of cured sausage, consisting of fermented and air-dried meat, typically pork or beef. Sliced for sandwiches.
entree.preparationNotes: Cured sausage with a rich, savory flavor. Most types are gluten-free.
entree.customerGuidance: Savory sliced salami, great for adding depth to sandwiches. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

entree.name: Smoked Turkey
entree.description: Sliced smoked turkey breast, a popular lean deli meat choice for sandwiches.
entree.preparationNotes: Commonly used as a cold cut in sandwiches. Most brands are gluten-free, but it's good to verify for additives.
entree.customerGuidance: Lean sliced smoked turkey, a classic sandwich choice. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

entree.name: Black Forest Ham
entree.description: A type of dry-cured smoked ham, known for its distinctive dark exterior and rich flavor, typically sliced for sandwiches.
entree.preparationNotes: Flavorful cured ham, usually gluten-free.
entree.customerGuidance: Richly flavored Black Forest ham slices. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

entree.name: Pepperoni
entree.description: An American variety of salami, usually made from cured pork and beef, seasoned with paprika or other chili pepper. Sliced for sandwiches or as a pizza topping.
entree.preparationNotes: Spicy cured sausage, typically gluten-free.
entree.customerGuidance: Spicy pepperoni slices, adding a kick to your sandwich. (Nutrition per 1oz/28g serving)

entree.name: Corned Beef
entree.description: Beef brisket that has been salt-cured. Often sliced for sandwiches like the Reuben.
entree.preparationNotes: Salt-cured beef brisket, a deli classic. Typically gluten-free.
entree.customerGuidance: Tender sliced corned beef, perfect for a hearty sandwich. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

entree.name: Roast Beef
entree.description: Beef that has been roasted and then typically sliced thinly for sandwiches. Can be served warm or cold.
entree.preparationNotes: Classic sliced roast beef. Naturally gluten-free when simply prepared.
entree.customerGuidance: Flavorful sliced roast beef, a deli staple. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

entree.name: Pastrami
entree.description: A popular delicatessen meat, typically made from beef brisket that is brined, partially dried, seasoned with herbs and spices, then smoked and steamed. Sliced for sandwiches.
entree.preparationNotes: Highly seasoned smoked beef, a deli favorite. Typically gluten-free.
entree.customerGuidance: Peppery and flavorful sliced pastrami. (Nutrition per 2oz/56g serving)

entree.name: Tossed Cobb
entree.description: A hearty American garden salad, typically made with chopped salad greens, tomato, crispy bacon, grilled or roasted chicken breast, hard-boiled eggs, avocado, chives, Roquefort cheese, and a vinaigrette dressing.
entree.preparationNotes: A substantial salad that can serve as a main course.
entree.customerGuidance: A classic American Cobb salad, loaded with toppings.

side.name: Rosemary Roasted Potatoes
side.description: Potatoes, often cut into chunks or wedges, roasted with olive oil, fresh rosemary, garlic, salt, and pepper until crispy on the outside and tender inside.
side.preparationNotes: Potatoes roasted with rosemary, garlic, and olive oil until golden and crispy.
side.customerGuidance: Crispy and flavorful rosemary roasted potatoes, a perfect side.

side.name: Green Beans Almondine
side.description: A classic French dish of green beans (haricots verts) blanched or steamed, then sautéed with butter, toasted slivered almonds, and often a squeeze of lemon juice.
side.preparationNotes: Green beans sautéed with toasted almonds and butter.
side.customerGuidance: Elegant green beans tossed with toasted almonds and butter.

side.name: Baked Cauliflower with Bechamel & Shaved Parmesan
side.description: Cauliflower florets blanched or steamed, then baked in a creamy béchamel sauce, often topped with breadcrumbs and shaved Parmesan cheese.
side.preparationNotes: Tender cauliflower baked in a creamy béchamel sauce and topped with Parmesan.
side.customerGuidance: Rich and creamy baked cauliflower with béchamel and Parmesan.

side.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts with Balsamic Crema
side.description: Brussels sprouts, often halved or quartered, roasted until tender and slightly caramelized, then drizzled with a sweet and tangy balsamic crema or glaze.
side.preparationNotes: Caramelized roasted Brussels sprouts finished with a balsamic drizzle.
side.customerGuidance: Deliciously roasted Brussels sprouts with a sweet balsamic finish.

side.name: Tuscan Roasted Carrots
side.description: Carrots roasted with olive oil and classic Tuscan herbs such as rosemary, thyme, sage, and garlic, until tender and slightly caramelized.
side.preparationNotes: Carrots roasted with aromatic Tuscan herbs and garlic.
side.customerGuidance: Sweet and savory Tuscan-style roasted carrots with fragrant herbs.

side.name: Roasted Lemon Potatoes with oregano
side.description: Greek-style roasted potatoes that are crispy on the outside and fluffy inside, infused with the bright flavors of lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano.
side.preparationNotes: Potatoes roasted with lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, and oregano until tender and golden.
side.customerGuidance: Tangy and herbaceous Greek-style roasted lemon potatoes.

side.name: Haricots Verts Almondine
side.description: A classic French side dish where slender green beans (haricots verts) are blanched until tender-crisp, then tossed with toasted slivered almonds and butter, often with a hint of lemon.
side.preparationNotes: Tender haricots verts sautéed with toasted almonds and butter.
side.customerGuidance: Elegant and crisp French green beans with toasted almonds.

side.name: Roasted Brussel Sprouts with balsamic glaze
side.description: Brussels sprouts roasted until tender-crisp and caramelized, then finished with a drizzle of sweet and tangy balsamic glaze.
side.preparationNotes: Crispy roasted Brussels sprouts with a sweet balsamic glaze.
side.customerGuidance: Perfectly roasted Brussels sprouts with a tangy balsamic finish.

side.name: Moroccan-Style Roasted Cauliflower with exotic spices
side.description: Cauliflower florets roasted with a blend of exotic Moroccan spices such as cumin, coriander, turmeric, cinnamon, and paprika, often with garlic and olive oil.
side.preparationNotes: Cauliflower roasted with a warm and aromatic blend of Moroccan spices.
side.customerGuidance: Aromatic and tender roasted cauliflower infused with exotic Moroccan spices.

side.name: Tuscan Glazed Carrots with herbs
side.description: Carrots, often whole or halved, glazed with a mixture that might include balsamic vinegar, honey or maple syrup, olive oil, and classic Tuscan herbs like rosemary and thyme.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if using maple syrup instead of honey)
side.preparationNotes: Carrots glazed with a sweet and savory mixture and roasted with Tuscan herbs.
side.customerGuidance: Tender, sweet, and herbaceous Tuscan glazed carrots.

side.name: Roasted Vegetables
side.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables roasted with olive oil, salt, pepper, and often herbs, until tender and slightly caramelized.
side.preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, roasted until tender and flavorful.
side.customerGuidance: A delicious and healthy medley of roasted seasonal vegetables.

side.name: Asiago Zucchini Bites
side.description: Small bites or fritters made with shredded zucchini, Asiago cheese, breadcrumbs, egg, and seasonings, then baked or fried until golden.
side.preparationNotes: Savory zucchini and Asiago cheese bites, often baked or fried.
side.customerGuidance: Cheesy and flavorful zucchini bites, perfect for starting a meal.

side.name: Avocado deviled Eggs
side.description: A twist on classic deviled eggs, where creamy avocado is blended into the yolk filling, often with lime juice, cilantro, and a hint of spice.
side.preparationNotes: Deviled eggs with avocado mixed into the yolk filling for creaminess and flavor.
side.customerGuidance: Creamy deviled eggs with a healthy avocado twist. (Values per egg half).

side.name: Dolmades - Grape leaves stuffed with rice and fresh herbs
side.description: Dolmades (or Dolmadakia Yialantzi if meatless) are tender grape leaves stuffed with a savory mixture of rice, onions, and copious fresh herbs like parsley, mint, and dill. They are gently simmered in a lemony broth with olive oil.
side.preparationNotes: Grape leaves stuffed with herbed rice. A classic vegan Greek meze. Check if pine nuts are included.
side.customerGuidance: Tender, flavorful rice-stuffed grape leaves. (Values per dolma).

side.name: Patatas Bravas
side.description: A classic Spanish tapas dish consisting of white potatoes that have been cut into irregular shapes of about 2 centimeters, then fried in oil and served warm with a spicy tomato-based 'salsa brava' and often a garlic aioli.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_EGG (if served with traditional aioli, please inquire)
CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if vinegar is used in salsa/aioli)
side.preparationNotes: Crispy fried potatoes with a spicy tomato sauce (salsa brava). Often served with garlic aioli (contains egg). Vegan if aioli is omitted or a vegan version is used.
suitableForDiets: VEGAN_DIET (without aioli or with vegan aioli)
side.customerGuidance: A Spanish classic: crispy potatoes with a zesty, spicy tomato sauce.

side.name: Potato Croquettes
side.description: Mashed potatoes, often mixed with cheese, herbs, or other flavorings, shaped into small logs or balls, coated in breadcrumbs, and deep-fried until golden and crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if cheese or butter/milk in mashed potatoes is used)
side.preparationNotes: Crispy fried mashed potato balls or logs. Contain wheat and egg. Usually contain dairy from cheese or mashed potato preparation; please inquire.
side.customerGuidance: Crispy on the outside, soft and fluffy potato croquettes. (Values per croquette).

side.name: Cannellini Beans with Caponata
side.description: A flavorful dish combining creamy cannellini beans with caponata, a Sicilian sweet and sour relish typically made with eggplant, celery, tomatoes, olives, and capers.
side.preparationNotes: Cannellini beans served with a sweet and sour Sicilian eggplant relish (caponata).
side.customerGuidance: A delightful mix of creamy cannellini beans and tangy Sicilian caponata.

side.name: Cannellini Beans with a sweet & sour caponata
side.description: Creamy cannellini beans served alongside or mixed with caponata, a traditional Sicilian sweet and sour eggplant relish made with celery, tomatoes, olives, capers, vinegar, and often a touch of sugar.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_NUTS (pine nuts, if used in caponata)
side.preparationNotes: Cannellini beans paired with a classic Sicilian sweet and sour eggplant caponata.
side.customerGuidance: A vibrant and flavorful combination of creamy beans and tangy caponata.

side.name: Peas with Pancetta
side.description: A simple yet flavorful side dish of sweet peas cooked with savory diced pancetta, often with onions or shallots and a touch of butter or olive oil.
side.preparationNotes: Sweet peas sautéed with crispy pancetta and onions.
side.customerGuidance: A savory and satisfying side of peas with crispy Italian bacon.

side.name: Cilantro-Lime Rice, fresh and zesty
side.description: Fluffy rice (typically long-grain white rice) seasoned with fresh cilantro, lime juice, and often a touch of lime zest and salt. A popular side for Mexican and Southwestern dishes.
side.preparationNotes: Rice flavored with fresh cilantro and lime juice.
side.customerGuidance: Bright, zesty, and refreshing cilantro-lime rice.

side.name: Greek Rice Pilaf with fresh herbs
side.description: A savory Greek rice pilaf, typically made with long-grain rice sautéed with onions and garlic, then simmered in broth and seasoned with fresh herbs like parsley, dill, and sometimes lemon juice.
side.preparationNotes: Flavorful rice pilaf cooked with broth and fresh Greek herbs.
side.customerGuidance: Aromatic and herby Greek-style rice pilaf.

side.name: Mexican Rice
side.description: Also known as Spanish rice, this is a popular side dish made from white rice cooked in a tomato-based broth with onions, garlic, and various seasonings like cumin and chili powder.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if vegetable broth and no lard)
side.preparationNotes: Rice cooked in a savory tomato broth with onions, garlic, and spices.
side.customerGuidance: Flavorful and savory Mexican-style rice. (Nutritional values per serving)

side.name: Bacon Jalapeño Corn Salad
side.description: A flavorful salad featuring sweet corn, crispy bacon, and spicy jalapeños, typically bound in a creamy dressing.
side.preparationNotes: A creamy, sweet, savory, and spicy corn salad. Contains bacon.
side.customerGuidance: Sweet corn salad with a kick of jalapeño and smoky bacon.

side.name: Ham hock baked Beans
side.description: Slow-cooked baked beans with a savory depth of flavor from smoked ham hocks, typically in a sweet and tangy sauce.
side.preparationNotes: Beans slow-cooked with smoked pork ham hocks for a rich, smoky flavor.
side.customerGuidance: Smoky and savory baked beans, a classic BBQ side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Mac n' Cheese
side.description: Classic comfort food featuring cooked macaroni pasta in a rich, creamy cheese sauce, often baked with a crispy topping.
side.preparationNotes: Creamy baked macaroni and cheese. Contains gluten and dairy.
side.customerGuidance: The ultimate creamy and cheesy comfort food. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
side.description: Creamy mashed potatoes infused with the savory flavor of roasted or sautéed garlic, typically made with butter and milk or cream.
side.preparationNotes: Creamy mashed potatoes with garlic. Contains dairy.
side.customerGuidance: Smooth and flavorful garlic mashed potatoes. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Mini Smashed Potatoes
side.description: Small potatoes that are boiled until tender, then smashed flat, seasoned, and roasted or fried until crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.
side.preparationNotes: Small potatoes, boiled, smashed, and roasted or fried until crispy. Can be made vegan/dairy-free if oil is used instead of butter.
side.customerGuidance: Crispy on the outside, fluffy on the inside. Ask about preparation if dairy is a concern. (Values per approx. 1 cup serving).

side.name: Twice Baked Potatoes
side.description: Baked potatoes where the flesh is scooped out, mixed with ingredients like butter, sour cream, cheese, and chives, then returned to the potato skins and baked again until golden.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in bacon bits if used)
side.preparationNotes: Potato skins filled with a creamy, cheesy potato mixture and baked again. Typically contains dairy and often bacon.
side.customerGuidance: A rich and satisfying loaded potato experience. (Values per potato half/small potato).

side.name: Corn on the Cob
side.description: Fresh ears of corn, typically boiled, steamed, or grilled, often served with butter and salt.
side.preparationNotes: Sweet corn cooked on the cob. Served plain; butter available separately.
side.customerGuidance: Sweet and simple corn on the cob. (Values per ear, without butter).

side.name: Creamed Corn
side.description: Sweet corn kernels cooked in a creamy sauce, typically made with milk or cream, butter, and sometimes a thickener like flour.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_WHEAT (if flour is used as thickener)
side.preparationNotes: Sweet corn in a creamy sauce. Contains dairy and may contain gluten if thickened with flour.
side.customerGuidance: Rich and creamy sweet corn. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

side.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts
side.description: Brussels sprouts, often halved or quartered, tossed with olive oil, salt, and pepper, then roasted until tender on the inside and caramelized and slightly crispy on the outside.
side.preparationNotes: Brussels sprouts roasted until tender and caramelized. Typically prepared simply, but inquire about any glazes or additions (e.g., bacon, nuts, balsamic which may contain sulphites).
side.customerGuidance: Deliciously caramelized roasted Brussels sprouts. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Grilled Vegetables
side.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables, such as bell peppers, zucchini, yellow squash, asparagus, and onions, lightly seasoned and grilled to bring out their natural sweetness and smoky flavor.
side.preparationNotes: A mix of seasonal vegetables, grilled with simple seasonings. Check for any specific glazes or marinades used.
side.customerGuidance: A healthy and flavorful assortment of grilled seasonal vegetables. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Grilled Asparagus
side.description: Fresh asparagus spears, lightly tossed with olive oil, salt, and pepper, then grilled until tender-crisp with a slight char.
side.preparationNotes: Asparagus spears grilled with simple seasoning. Check for any accompanying sauces or drizzles.
side.customerGuidance: Tender-crisp grilled asparagus with a hint of char. (Values per approx. 100-150g serving).

side.name: Coleslaw
side.description: A salad of finely shredded raw cabbage, often with shredded carrots, dressed with a vinaigrette or a creamy dressing typically made with mayonnaise.
side.preparationNotes: Creamy and crunchy, a popular side for barbecue and fried foods. Dressing often contains mayonnaise.
side.customerGuidance: Classic creamy and tangy coleslaw. Contains egg.

side.name: Classic Potato Salad
side.description: A traditional American side dish made from boiled potatoes, typically dressed with mayonnaise, mustard, and various other ingredients like celery, onion, and hard-boiled eggs.
side.preparationNotes: Creamy, chunky potato salad, a staple at picnics and gatherings. Contains egg.
side.customerGuidance: Comforting and familiar creamy potato salad.

side.name: German Potato Salad
side.description: A potato salad variety that usually includes a vinegar and bacon-based dressing, often served warm or at room temperature, distinct from creamy American-style potato salads.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_WHEAT (if flour used for thickening)
side.preparationNotes: Tangy and savory potato salad with a warm bacon vinaigrette. Often dairy-free, but may contain wheat.
side.customerGuidance: A unique, warm potato salad with a sweet and sour bacon dressing.

side.name: Macaroni Salad
side.description: A type of pasta salad, served cold, made with cooked elbow macaroni and usually prepared with a mayonnaise-based dressing. Various other ingredients like celery, onion, and bell peppers are often included.
side.preparationNotes: Creamy, chilled macaroni salad, a popular deli-style side. Contains egg and wheat.
side.customerGuidance: Classic creamy macaroni salad, perfect for a comforting side.

side.name: Hawaiian Macaroni Salad
side.description: A distinctive macaroni salad popular in Hawaii, known for its very creamy texture, achieved by overcooking the pasta and using a generous amount of mayonnaise, often with shredded carrots and a touch of vinegar.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_DAIRY (if milk is used)
side.preparationNotes: Uniquely creamy and slightly tangy macaroni salad, a Hawaiian plate lunch staple. Pasta is intentionally soft.
side.customerGuidance: Authentic, super creamy Hawaiian-style mac salad.

side.name: Fruit Salad
side.description: A dish consisting of various kinds of fruit, sometimes served in a liquid, either their own juices or a syrup. It can be served as an appetizer, a side salad, or a dessert.
allergenAlerts: May contain CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if certain dried fruits or lemon/lime juice concentrate is used, or to prevent browning)
side.preparationNotes: A refreshing assortment of fresh fruits. Selection may vary daily.
side.customerGuidance: A light and healthy mix of seasonal fresh fruits.

side.name: Mixed Vegetables
side.description: A medley of seasonal vegetables, typically steamed, roasted, sautéed, or grilled. A simple and healthy side option.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if cooked with butter, please inquire)
side.preparationNotes: A simple mix of cooked vegetables. Confirm preparation if dairy is a concern (butter vs. oil).
side.customerGuidance: A healthy assortment of cooked seasonal vegetables. (Values per 1 cup serving, lightly seasoned).

side.name: Yellow Rice Pilaf
side.description: A flavorful rice dish, typically made with long-grain white rice cooked in broth with spices that impart a yellow color, such as turmeric or saffron. Often includes sautéed onions and sometimes other vegetables or aromatics.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if butter is used, please inquire)
side.preparationNotes: Rice pilaf with a yellow hue from spices like turmeric or saffron. Vegan if prepared with vegetable broth and oil instead of butter.
side.customerGuidance: Aromatic yellow rice pilaf, a versatile side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Wild Rice and Mushroom Pilaf
side.description: A savory and earthy pilaf featuring nutty wild rice cooked with sautéed mushrooms, onions, garlic, herbs, and broth. Often includes other grains or aromatics.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (if butter is used, please inquire)
side.preparationNotes: Nutty wild rice pilaf with savory mushrooms. Vegan if prepared with vegetable broth and oil instead of butter.
side.customerGuidance: Earthy and flavorful wild rice and mushroom pilaf. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Roasted beets
side.description: Beets, typically peeled and cut, tossed with olive oil, salt, and pepper, then roasted until tender and their natural sweetness is concentrated. May be served warm or cold.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SULPHITES (if balsamic glaze is used and contains sulphites, please inquire)
side.preparationNotes: Simply roasted beets, highlighting their natural sweetness. Check if any glazes are added.
side.customerGuidance: Sweet and earthy roasted beets. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

side.name: Roasted Rosemary & Garlic Potatoes
side.description: Potatoes, typically quartered or wedged, tossed with olive oil, fresh rosemary, minced garlic, salt, and pepper, then roasted until golden brown, crispy on the outside, and fluffy on the inside.
side.preparationNotes: Crispy and aromatic roasted potatoes with rosemary and garlic.
side.customerGuidance: Classic roasted potatoes infused with rosemary and garlic. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Grilled Asparagus spears with Shaved Parmesan
side.description: Fresh asparagus spears, lightly grilled until tender-crisp and slightly charred, then topped with delicate shavings of Parmesan cheese and often a drizzle of olive oil or a squeeze of lemon.
side.preparationNotes: Grilled asparagus topped with shaved Parmesan. Contains dairy.
side.customerGuidance: Tender-crisp grilled asparagus elevated with savory Parmesan. (Values per serving, approx 100-150g).

side.name: Sautéed Garlic Broccolini with a hint of chili
side.description: Tender broccolini (baby broccoli) sautéed with minced garlic in olive oil, seasoned with salt, pepper, and a subtle hint of red chili flakes for a touch of warmth.
side.preparationNotes: Broccolini sautéed with garlic and a touch of chili heat.
side.customerGuidance: Tender-crisp garlic broccolini with a slight chili kick. (Values per serving).

side.name: Grilled Vegetable Medley with balsamic glaze
side.description: An assortment of seasonal vegetables (such as zucchini, bell peppers, eggplant, asparagus, onions) grilled until tender-crisp and lightly charred, then drizzled with a sweet and tangy balsamic glaze.
side.preparationNotes: Grilled vegetables finished with a balsamic glaze. Contains sulphites.
side.customerGuidance: Smoky grilled vegetables enhanced with a sweet balsamic glaze. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Smoky Pit Baked Beans with bacon bits
side.description: Classic baked beans slow-cooked with a deep, smoky flavor reminiscent of pit barbecue, enriched with molasses, brown sugar, spices, and savory bacon bits for added taste and texture.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in Worcestershire or bacon bits)
side.preparationNotes: Slow-cooked baked beans with a smoky flavor and bacon. Check Worcestershire/bacon bits for allergens.
side.customerGuidance: Rich, smoky, and savory pit-style baked beans with bacon. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Loaded Baked Potato Bar with all the fixings
side.description: A customizable offering featuring fluffy baked potatoes and a variety of popular toppings such as cheese, bacon bits, sour cream, chives, chili, and butter, allowing guests to create their perfect loaded potato.
allergenAlerts: Base potato is allergen-free. Toppings may introduce: CONTAINS_DAIRY (cheese, sour cream, butter), CONTAINS_SOY (some chili or bacon bits). Specific allergens depend on selected toppings.

side.name: Garlic Herb Mashed Potatoes

side.customerGuidance: Creamy, garlicky, and herbaceous mashed potatoes.

side.name: Crispy Mini Smashed Potatoes with rosemary

side.name: Twice Baked Potatoes with Cheddar & Chives

side.name: Sweet Grilled Corn on the Cob with flavored butters
side.description: Fresh sweet corn grilled to perfection, achieving a smoky char and enhanced sweetness, served with a selection of flavored butters (e.g., herb, chili-lime, garlic).

side.customerGuidance: Sweet and smoky grilled corn, choose your flavored butter! (Nutritional info for corn with light butter)

side.name: Southern Style Creamed Corn

side.preparationNotes: Sweet corn in a rich, creamy sauce. May contain bacon or flour; please inquire.
side.customerGuidance: Rich and creamy Southern-style corn, a true comfort food.

side.name: Roasted Brussels Sprouts with Maple-Balsamic Glaze
side.description: Brussels sprouts roasted until tender and slightly caramelized, then tossed in a sweet and tangy glaze made from maple syrup and balsamic vinegar.

side.name: Classic Buttermilk Cornbread Muffins
side.description: Moist and tender cornbread muffins made with buttermilk, offering a slightly tangy flavor and a delightful crumb. Perfect accompaniment to many meals.
side.preparationNotes: Traditional cornbread muffins with a tender crumb from buttermilk.
side.customerGuidance: Moist and flavorful buttermilk cornbread muffins.

side.name: Cheddar Jalapeño Cornbread
side.description: A savory take on classic cornbread, featuring sharp cheddar cheese and spicy diced jalapeños baked into the bread for a flavorful kick.

side.customerGuidance: Cheesy and spicy jalapeño cornbread with a kick.

side.name: Medley of Grilled Seasonal Vegetables
side.description: A colorful assortment of fresh seasonal vegetables, such as bell peppers, zucchini, yellow squash, asparagus, and onions, lightly seasoned and grilled to bring out their natural sweetness and smoky flavor.

side.name: Grilled Asparagus with Lemon Zest

side.preparationNotes: Simply grilled asparagus with a fresh citrus finish.
side.customerGuidance: Light and flavorful grilled asparagus with a hint of lemon.

side.name: Creamy Country Coleslaw
side.description: A classic American side featuring finely shredded cabbage and carrots in a rich, creamy, and tangy mayonnaise-based dressing.
side.preparationNotes: Homestyle coleslaw with a traditional creamy and tangy dressing.

side.name: Summer Pasta Salad with fresh vegetables

side.name: Loaded Macaroni Salad with cheddar and bacon
side.description: A hearty macaroni salad taken to the next level with additions like shredded cheddar cheese, crispy bacon bits, bell peppers, and celery, all in a creamy seasoned dressing.

side.name: Seasonal Fresh Fruit Platter with honey-lime drizzle

side.preparationNotes: Orzo pasta cooked in a savory tomato sauce with hints of cinnamon. Confirm if feta is added.

side.name: Fasolakia Ladera (Green beans stewed in olive oil & tomato)
side.description: A traditional Greek vegetarian dish (ladera) featuring fresh green beans braised in olive oil with ripe tomatoes, onions, garlic, and herbs like parsley or dill until tender and flavorful.

side.name: Panzanella Bread Salad
side.description: A Tuscan chopped salad of soaked stale bread, tomatoes, onions, and cucumbers, often including basil, and dressed with olive oil and vinegar.

side.description: A refreshing Sicilian salad featuring thinly sliced raw fennel, oranges (or other citrus), red onions, and often black olives, dressed with olive oil and sometimes a hint of vinegar.

side.customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful Tuscan bread salad, perfect for summer.

side.description: A cold pasta salad featuring bowtie (farfalle) pasta tossed with Mediterranean ingredients like cucumbers, tomatoes, Kalamata olives, feta cheese, red onion, and a lemon-herb vinaigrette.

side.preparationNotes: Orzo pasta salad with rich pesto, sun-dried tomatoes, and fresh greens.

side.name: Fresh Garden Salad with a choice of vegan dressings

It features finely shredded green and/or red cabbage, often with grated carrots, dressed with extra virgin olive oil and fresh lemon juice, and sometimes includes herbs like dill or parsley.

side.customerGuidance: Crisp and refreshing Greek-style coleslaw.

It features boiled or steamed potatoes tossed with sliced red onions, Kalamata olives, fresh parsley, and a generous dressing of extra virgin olive oil and often lemon juice or red wine vinegar. Unlike American potato salad, it does not usually contain mayonnaise.

This version is tossed in a creamy and zesty lemon-tahini dressing.

side.name: Kimchi
side.description: A traditional Korean side dish of salted and fermented vegetables, such as napa cabbage and Korean radish, made with a widely varying selection of seasonings including gochugaru (Korean chili powder), spring onions, garlic, ginger, and jeotgal (salted seafood).
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SHELLFISH (fermented shrimp paste). Allergen content can vary; inquire for specific batch details if concerned, especially for vegetarian/vegan needs.
side.preparationNotes: Spicy, sour, and umami-rich fermented Korean staple. Typically contains fish/shellfish products.
side.customerGuidance: Authentic spicy and tangy fermented Korean kimchi. Usually contains seafood ingredients.

side.name: Vegetable kebabs
side.description: Skewers of assorted fresh vegetables, such as bell peppers, onions, zucchini, cherry tomatoes, and mushrooms, often marinated and grilled or roasted.
side.preparationNotes: Assorted vegetables grilled on skewers. Marinade is typically oil, vinegar and herb based; confirm if specific concerns.
side.customerGuidance: Colorful and healthy grilled vegetable skewers. (Values per 1-2 skewers).

side.name: Grilled Cauliflower Steaks
side.description: Thick-cut slices of cauliflower, seasoned and grilled or roasted until tender-crisp, often served as a vegetarian main course alternative.
side.preparationNotes: Thick slices of cauliflower, seasoned and grilled. Check for any specific sauces served alongside.
side.customerGuidance: A hearty and flavorful plant-based 'steak'. (Values per large steak, approx 150-200g).

side.name: Baked Potato Bar
side.description: A customizable baked potato station where guests can load their fluffy baked potatoes with a variety of toppings like butter, sour cream, cheese, chives, bacon bits, and chili.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_SOY (potentially in chili or bacon bits)
side.preparationNotes: Interactive station for creating personalized loaded baked potatoes. Many toppings available; dietary suitability depends on choices.
side.customerGuidance: Create your ultimate loaded baked potato! (Values vary greatly with toppings).

side.name: Corn Bread
side.description: A quick bread made with cornmeal, often with a slightly sweet or savory flavor and a crumbly texture. Can be baked in a pan, skillet, or as muffins.
side.preparationNotes: Classic cornbread. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
side.customerGuidance: Moist and flavorful traditional cornbread. (Values per average slice/muffin).

side.name: Jalapeno cornbread
side.description: Cornbread with the added kick of diced jalapeño peppers, offering a balance of sweet, savory, and spicy flavors. Often includes cheese as well.
side.preparationNotes: Cornbread with jalapeños for a spicy kick. Contains wheat, egg, and dairy.
side.customerGuidance: Moist cornbread with a pleasant jalapeño spice. (Values per average slice/muffin).

side.name: Spanakopita - House made phyllo dough pouches stuffed with spinach, greens, herbs, and feta cheese
side.description: A classic Greek savory pie or individual pouches made with flaky, house-made phyllo dough, filled with a mixture of spinach, various greens (like chard or leeks), fresh herbs (dill, parsley), and tangy feta cheese.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_DAIRY (feta cheese, butter if used in phyllo)
CONTAINS_EGG (if used as binder in filling)
side.preparationNotes: Savory spinach and feta pie in flaky phyllo pastry. Contains wheat and dairy. Please inquire if egg is used in the filling.
side.customerGuidance: Crispy, flaky, and flavorful spinach and feta phyllo pie. (Values per typical triangular portion).

side.name: Kritharaki - Orzo pasta baked in the oven. A pasta side dish choice with any main
side.description: Kritharaki, also known as orzo, is a small, rice-shaped pasta. In this Greek preparation, it's typically baked in the oven, often with tomato sauce, broth, onions, and herbs, resulting in a flavorful and tender side dish.
side.preparationNotes: Orzo pasta baked until tender, often in a light tomato-herb sauce. Confirm if chicken broth or cheese is used if vegan/dairy-free is required.
side.customerGuidance: Flavorful baked orzo pasta, a classic Greek side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Gigandes Plaki - Oven baked lima beans in a herbaceous tomato sauce
side.description: Gigandes Plaki are giant dried white lima beans (Gigantes beans) baked in a rich, herbaceous tomato sauce with onions, garlic, olive oil, and plenty of fresh herbs like dill, parsley, and oregano. A hearty and flavorful vegetarian Greek classic.
side.preparationNotes: Large lima beans baked in a savory tomato and herb sauce. A staple of Greek cuisine.
side.customerGuidance: Hearty and delicious oven-baked giant lima beans.

side.name: Baked Vegetables - Briam - Thinly sliced vegetable medley, seasoned and baked till lightly charred
side.description: Briam is a traditional Greek roasted vegetable dish. It consists of a medley of summer vegetables, such as potatoes, zucchini, eggplant, tomatoes, and onions, thinly sliced or chunked, generously drizzled with olive oil, seasoned with herbs (especially oregano), and baked until tender and slightly charred.
side.preparationNotes: A hearty medley of roasted Mediterranean vegetables baked in olive oil and herbs.
side.customerGuidance: Deliciously roasted Greek vegetable medley, simple and flavorful.

side.name: Cuban-Style Black Beans and Rice
side.description: A staple Cuban dish (Moros y Cristianos if cooked together, or separately as Arroz con Frijoles Negros) featuring fluffy white rice served with savory, seasoned black beans. The beans are typically cooked with onions, garlic, bell peppers, cumin, oregano, and bay leaf.
side.preparationNotes: Classic Cuban black beans and rice, a hearty and flavorful combination.
side.customerGuidance: Comforting and nutritious Cuban-style black beans served with rice. (Values per large serving).

side.name: Bacon wrapped Asparagus
side.description: Fresh asparagus spears wrapped in savory bacon strips, then typically roasted, grilled, or pan-fried until the bacon is crispy and the asparagus is tender-crisp.
side.preparationNotes: Asparagus spears wrapped in bacon and cooked until bacon is crisp.
side.customerGuidance: A classic pairing of tender asparagus and crispy bacon. (Values per approx. 3-4 spears).

side.name: Mushrooms
side.description: Fresh mushrooms, typically sautéed, grilled, or roasted. Offered as a side dish, topping, or ingredient.
side.preparationNotes: Simply prepared mushrooms. Please inquire if cooked with butter for dairy concerns. Vegan if cooked with oil.
side.customerGuidance: Earthy and savory mushrooms. (Values per 1/2 cup cooked serving).

side.name: Cous-cous
side.description: Small steamed balls of crushed durum wheat semolina, traditionally served with a stew spooned on top or as a simple side dish. This refers to plain prepared couscous.
side.preparationNotes: Plain steamed couscous. Contains wheat. Vegan if prepared without butter.
side.customerGuidance: Light and fluffy plain couscous. (Values per 1 cup cooked serving).

side.name: Creamy Saffron Risotto Milanese
side.description: A classic Northern Italian risotto dish from Milan, known for its vibrant yellow color from saffron threads. Made with Arborio or Carnaroli rice, slowly cooked in broth, and enriched with butter, Parmesan cheese, and often white wine and beef bone marrow (though marrow is less common in many modern recipes).
side.category: Side Dish / Main Course - Vegetarian (if veg broth)
side.preparationNotes: Rich and creamy saffron-infused risotto. Contains dairy. Vegetarian if made with vegetable broth and without bone marrow; please inquire.
side.customerGuidance: Luxurious and aromatic saffron risotto from Milan. (Values per serving).

side.name: Colorful Roasted Fajita Vegetables (Vegan)
side.description: A vibrant mix of bell peppers (various colors) and onions, sliced and roasted with olive oil and classic fajita seasonings like chili powder and cumin, until tender-crisp and slightly caramelized. A perfect vegan accompaniment or filling.
side.preparationNotes: Sweet and smoky roasted bell peppers and onions for fajitas.
side.customerGuidance: Colorful and flavorful roasted vegetables, perfect for fajitas or as a side. (Values per 1 cup serving).

side.name: Fire-Roasted Bell Peppers & Onions
side.description: A flavorful mix of bell peppers (various colors) and onions, fire-roasted to impart a smoky char and bring out their natural sweetness. Often used as a topping or side.
side.preparationNotes: Smoky and sweet fire-roasted bell peppers and onions.
side.customerGuidance: Sweet and smoky roasted peppers and onions. (Values per 1/2 cup serving).

side.name: Creamy Three-Cheese Mac n' Cheese Bake
side.description: An indulgent baked macaroni and cheese made with a blend of three cheeses (such as cheddar, Gruyère, and Parmesan) creating an extra creamy and flavorful sauce, often topped with breadcrumbs for a crispy finish.
side.preparationNotes: Extra creamy baked macaroni and cheese with a blend of three cheeses. Contains wheat and dairy.
side.customerGuidance: The ultimate comfort food: a rich and creamy three-cheese mac n' cheese. (Values per generous serving).

side.name: Bread basket - variety such as white, whole grain- multigrain with butter and jam.
side.description: An assortment of fresh breads including white, whole grain, and multigrain varieties, served with individual portions of butter and fruit jam.
side.preparationNotes: A selection of classic breakfast breads. Vegan option possible if butter is substituted and breads are confirmed vegan. Nut content depends on specific breads selected.
side.customerGuidance: Assorted breakfast breads with butter and jam. Notify for nut allergies due to potential bread ingredients.

side.name: Toast - Sourdough
side.description: Toasted slices of sourdough bread, known for its tangy flavor and chewy texture. Typically served with butter or jam on the side.
side.preparationNotes: Sourdough bread is typically vegan. Served plain or with optional butter/jam (butter is not vegan/dairy-free). Nutrition for 2 slices, plain.
side.customerGuidance: Tangy sourdough toast. (Nutrition for 2 slices, plain)

side.name: Toast - White
side.description: Toasted slices of classic white bread. Typically served with butter or jam on the side.
side.preparationNotes: Classic white toast. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on bread ingredients. Served plain or with optional butter/jam. Nutrition for 2 slices, plain.
side.customerGuidance: Simple white toast. (Nutrition for 2 slices, plain)

side.name: Toast - Whole Wheat
side.description: Toasted slices of whole wheat bread, offering more fiber than white bread. Typically served with butter or jam on the side.
side.preparationNotes: Wholesome whole wheat toast. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on bread ingredients (check for honey/dairy). Nutrition for 2 slices, plain.
side.customerGuidance: Nutritious whole wheat toast. (Nutrition for 2 slices, plain)

side.name: English Muffins
side.description: Small, round, yeast-leavened bread, typically split horizontally, toasted, and served with butter and/or jam.
side.preparationNotes: Classic toasted English muffins. Vegan/dairy-free status depends on brand ingredients. Nutrition per muffin, plain.
side.customerGuidance: Toasted English muffin, perfect for breakfast sandwiches or with spreads. (Nutrition per muffin, plain)

side.name: Biscuits
side.description: Soft, leavened quick bread, typically with a fluffy interior and a slightly crisp exterior. Often served with butter, jam, or gravy.
side.preparationNotes: Traditional breakfast biscuits, typically made with dairy. Nutrition per biscuit, plain.
side.customerGuidance: Warm, fluffy breakfast biscuits. (Nutrition per biscuit, plain)

side.name: Hashbrowns
side.description: Potatoes that have been shredded or diced, then pan-fried until crispy and golden brown. Often seasoned with salt and pepper.
side.preparationNotes: Crispy fried potatoes. Vegan and dairy-free if prepared with oil instead of butter.
side.customerGuidance: Crispy shredded or diced hashbrown potatoes. (Nutrition per serving)

side.name: Home Fries
side.description: Diced or sliced potatoes, often parboiled then pan-fried with onions and sometimes bell peppers, until browned and tender.
side.preparationNotes: Hearty pan-fried potatoes with onions. Vegan and dairy-free if prepared with oil instead of butter.
side.customerGuidance: Savory home-fried potatoes, often with onions and peppers. (Nutrition per serving)

side.name: Grits
side.description: A porridge made from boiled cornmeal, typically ground hominy. Can be served savory (with butter, cheese, salt, pepper) or sweet.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if made with water and no dairy additions)
allergenAlerts: MAY_CONTAIN_DAIRY (if made with milk or topped with butter/cheese)
side.preparationNotes: Southern-style corn porridge. Vegan and dairy-free if prepared with water and without dairy toppings.
side.customerGuidance: Creamy corn grits, a Southern classic. Can be customized savory or sweet. (Nutrition per serving, varies with additions)

side.name: Oatmeal
side.description: A hot cereal made from oats (rolled, steel-cut, or instant), typically cooked with water or milk. Can be served plain or with various toppings.
dietaryFlags: VEGAN_OPTION (if made with water/plant milk and vegan toppings)
allergenAlerts: MAY_CONTAIN_DAIRY (if made with milk or dairy toppings)
MAY_CONTAIN_NUTS (if nuts are added as topping)
side.preparationNotes: Warm and hearty oatmeal. Gluten-free if made with certified GF oats. Vegan/dairy-free if made with water or plant-based milk and no dairy toppings. Nut-free if no nut toppings.
suitableForDiets: VEGETARIAN_DIET (check oats for GF certification if needed)
side.customerGuidance: Comforting oatmeal, customizable with toppings. (Nutrition per serving, varies with additions)

side.name: Classic Potato Salad
side.description: A traditional cold salad made from boiled potatoes, typically mixed with mayonnaise, mustard, hard-boiled eggs, celery, and onion.
side.preparationNotes: Creamy and satisfying potato salad. Typically gluten-free.
side.customerGuidance: Classic creamy American potato salad.

dessert.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait - 2% FAGE yogurt, granola, berries
dessert.description: A layered parfait featuring FAGE Total 2% Milkfat Plain Greek Yogurt, crunchy granola, and fresh mixed berries.
dessert.preparationNotes: A wholesome and satisfying parfait. Granola type determines gluten and specific nut content.
dessert.customerGuidance: Creamy Greek yogurt layered with crunchy granola and fresh berries. Check granola for specific allergens.

dessert.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait -0% FAGE yogurt, granola, berries
dessert.description: A layered parfait featuring FAGE Total 0% Milkfat Nonfat Plain Greek Yogurt, crunchy granola, and fresh mixed berries.
dessert.preparationNotes: A lighter parfait option with nonfat Greek yogurt. Granola type determines gluten and specific nut content.
dessert.customerGuidance: A delicious nonfat Greek yogurt parfait with granola and berries. Check granola for specific allergens.

dessert.name: Bread pudding
dessert.description: A baked dessert or sweet breakfast dish made with bread, milk or cream, eggs, sugar, and often spices like cinnamon and nutmeg. May include raisins or other additions.
dessert.preparationNotes: A rich, custard-like bread-based dish. Often served warm. May contain nuts.
dessert.customerGuidance: Warm and comforting bread pudding, a sweet treat. (Nutrition per serving)

beverage.name: Home Bites 96 oz Box of Coffee - Regular
beverage.description: A large, 96 oz insulated box of regular caffeinated brewed coffee, suitable for serving multiple people.
beverage.preparationNotes: Bulk regular coffee. Typically serves 8-12 cups. Nutritional values are for black coffee.
beverage.customerGuidance: Freshly brewed regular coffee in a convenient 96 oz serving box. (Nutrition per 8oz serving, black)

beverage.name: Home Bites 96 oz Box of Coffee - Decaf
beverage.description: A large, 96 oz insulated box of decaffeinated brewed coffee, suitable for serving multiple people.
beverage.preparationNotes: Bulk decaf coffee. Typically serves 8-12 cups. Nutritional values are for black coffee.
beverage.customerGuidance: Freshly brewed decaf coffee in a 96 oz serving box. (Nutrition per 8oz serving, black)

beverage.name: Starbucks Coffee Traveler - Pike Regular
beverage.description: A Starbucks Coffee Traveler filled with their signature Pike Place Roast regular caffeinated coffee, holding approximately 96 fl oz.
beverage.preparationNotes: Starbucks Pike Place Roast regular coffee in a portable 96 oz traveler. Serves about 12 (8oz) cups. Nutritional values for black coffee.
beverage.customerGuidance: Enjoy Starbucks Pike Place Roast regular coffee, serves a group. (Nutrition per 8oz serving, black)

beverage.name: Starbucks Coffee Traveler - Pike Decaf
beverage.description: A Starbucks Coffee Traveler filled with their signature Pike Place Roast decaffeinated coffee, holding approximately 96 fl oz.
beverage.preparationNotes: Starbucks Pike Place Roast decaf coffee in a portable 96 oz traveler. Serves about 12 (8oz) cups. Nutritional values for black coffee.
beverage.customerGuidance: Enjoy Starbucks Decaf Pike Place Roast coffee, serves a group. (Nutrition per 8oz serving, black)

beverage.name: Dunkin Box O' Joe - Regular
beverage.description: A Dunkin' Box O' Joe filled with their Original Blend regular caffeinated coffee, holding approximately 10 (10oz) servings.
beverage.preparationNotes: Dunkin' Original Blend regular coffee in a portable box. Nutritional values for black coffee.
beverage.customerGuidance: Dunkin's classic regular coffee, ready to serve a crowd. (Nutrition per 10oz serving, black)

beverage.name: Dunkin Box O' Joe - Decaf
beverage.description: A Dunkin' Box O' Joe filled with their Original Blend decaffeinated coffee, holding approximately 10 (10oz) servings.
beverage.preparationNotes: Dunkin' Original Blend decaf coffee in a portable box. Nutritional values for black coffee.
beverage.customerGuidance: Dunkin's classic decaf coffee, ready to serve a crowd. (Nutrition per 10oz serving, black)

beverage.name: Starbucks Ready to Drink Coffee, Espresso & Cream, 6.5oz Cans
beverage.description: A canned Starbucks ready-to-drink beverage blending bold espresso with rich cream and sugar.
beverage.preparationNotes: A sweet and creamy canned espresso beverage.
beverage.customerGuidance: A chilled, sweet, and creamy espresso drink for a quick coffee fix.

beverage.name: Dunkin Hot Chocolate -Box O'Joe Hot
beverage.description: A Dunkin' Box O' Joe filled with their classic hot chocolate, holding approximately 10 (10oz) servings.
beverage.preparationNotes: Creamy hot chocolate served in a bulk container. Gluten status can vary for hot chocolate mixes.
beverage.customerGuidance: Rich and comforting Dunkin' hot chocolate, perfect for sharing. (Nutrition per 10oz serving)

beverage.name: Home Bites 96 oz Box of Tea - Assorted Flavors
beverage.description: A large, 96 oz insulated box of hot water accompanied by a selection of assorted tea bags (e.g., black, green, herbal).
beverage.preparationNotes: Bulk hot water with a variety of tea bags for individual selection. Nutritional values for plain, unsweetened tea.
beverage.customerGuidance: A selection of teas with hot water, served in a convenient 96 oz box. (Nutrition per 8oz serving, plain tea)

beverage.name: Lucky Jack Cold Brew Coffee Vanilla - Draft Pour Nitro Latte w/Oat Milk - cold
beverage.description: A canned nitro cold brew coffee latte from Lucky Jack, flavored with vanilla and made with oat milk.
allergenAlerts: CONTAINS_OATS (may or may not be certified gluten-free)
beverage.preparationNotes: A creamy, dairy-free nitro cold brew latte with vanilla flavor. Check oat milk source for gluten-free certification if required.
beverage.customerGuidance: A smooth and creamy vanilla nitro cold brew latte made with oat milk.

beverage.name: Juice - Orange
beverage.description: Classic orange juice, typically 100% juice, served chilled.
beverage.preparationNotes: Standard orange juice. Nutritional values per 8oz (240ml) serving.

beverage.name: Juice - Apple
beverage.description: Classic apple juice, typically 100% juice, served chilled.
beverage.preparationNotes: Standard apple juice. Nutritional values per 8oz (240ml) serving.

beverage.name: Juice - Grapefruit
beverage.description: Tart and tangy grapefruit juice, typically 100% juice, served chilled.
beverage.preparationNotes: Standard grapefruit juice. Nutritional values per 8oz (240ml) serving. Can interact with certain medications.
beverage.customerGuidance: Tangy and invigorating 100% grapefruit juice. Note: may interact with some medications.

beverage.name: Juice - Cranberry
beverage.description: Tart cranberry juice, often a juice cocktail blend due to cranberry's natural tartness.
beverage.preparationNotes: Typically cranberry juice cocktail. Nutritional values per 8oz (240ml) serving reflect this.
beverage.customerGuidance: Crisp and tart cranberry juice beverage.

beverage.name: Juice - Tomato
beverage.description: Savory tomato juice, often lightly seasoned.
beverage.preparationNotes: Standard tomato juice. Nutritional values per 8oz (240ml) serving.

beverage.name: Juice - V8 Classic
beverage.description: V8 Original 100% Vegetable Juice, a blend of eight vegetables.
beverage.preparationNotes: A classic vegetable juice blend. Nutritional values per 8oz (240ml) serving.
beverage.customerGuidance: A savory blend of 8 vegetables, packed with nutrients.

beverage.name: V8 +ENERGY Peach Mango
beverage.description: A V8 +Energy drink flavored with peach and mango, providing steady energy from black and green tea.
beverage.preparationNotes: A fruit and vegetable juice beverage with added caffeine from tea. Nutritional values per 8oz can.
beverage.customerGuidance: A refreshing peach mango energy drink with caffeine from tea.

beverage.name: V8 +ENERGY Black Cherry
beverage.description: A V8 +Energy drink flavored with black cherry, providing steady energy from black and green tea.
beverage.preparationNotes: A fruit and vegetable juice beverage with added caffeine from tea. Nutritional values per 8oz can.
beverage.customerGuidance: A delicious black cherry energy drink with caffeine from tea.

beverage.name: V8 +ENERGY Pomegranate Blueberry
beverage.description: A V8 +Energy drink flavored with pomegranate and blueberry, providing steady energy from black and green tea.
beverage.preparationNotes: A fruit and vegetable juice beverage with added caffeine from tea. Nutritional values per 8oz can.
